clean_body: The NJ GOP is losing - but we don’t have to | | | | == | Peter, In 2021, elections across the great State of New Jersey showed we can turn this state red. But we lost because of ONE reason: mail-in ballots. The Democrats constantly win because they take advantage of mail-in ballots and their operation is well organized and funded. Republicans lose because we have NO PLAN to help hard-working and busy Republican voters safely and securely submit their vote through the mail. The American Comeback PAC plans on changing that. Our goal is to target New Jersey's hard-working voters that are up at the crack of dawn and get home when the polls are already closed. We NEED to ensure they send in their ballots and have their voices heard because they are the heart and soul of this great state. The NJ GOP has done nothing to help this crucial group get their vote in -- and it is costing us elections. If they won't do it, then the American Comeback PAC will and help ensure your freedoms are returned to you in this state. New Jersey's own Vince Lombardi once said "Winning isn't everything, it is the only thing". Well, we need to win now more than ever. We're tired of losing, and if you are too, we hope you'll join our efforts to turn New Jersey into a RED STATE in 2023 and beyond! == | == | == | == | == | == Thank you, == Tom Toomey American Comeback Chairman Enough is Enough! | | | | | | | The American Comeback PAC | 7151 Richmond Rd., Suite 202, Williamsburg, VA 23188 | Sent by mailto:contact@mail.americancomeback.org

name: Brent Bozell
subject: 10 BIG reveals about Hunter Biden the media refuses to cover
body:
Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden’s family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden’s family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbop5hcpdqoku9v8qdu7abjgu4bd6l3nuber1hv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chim9o36chh2bs)
Friend,

Congress begins its first public hearings on President Joe Biden’s family, including Hunter and his ties to foreign companies.

But you won’t find anything about it in the mainstream media.

_**ABC, CBS, and NBC refuse to give these stories the attention they deserve. **_

It’s not just the salacious stories of drug use, illegal gun possession, hookers, and nude photos they ignore. Some cases show Joe Biden lied in 2019: _“I’ve never spoken to my son [Hunter] about his overseas business dealings!”_

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the ONLY conservative organization dedicated to exposing the liars on ABC, CBS, NBC, and the rest of the Fake News media.

In fact, our work has successfully gotten CNN staff FIRED from their jobs.

[_**You can help the Media Research Center defeat the Fake News media. I set an URGENT goal of raising $10,000 from Babylon Bee readers. Click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount today. >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5p3453pdtipga9kauj4u7kn2p543p9r7toulvd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chim9o36chh2bs)

**Here are 10 breaking Hunter Biden stories and how long the left-wing media covered them.**

1. Hunter Admits Laptop Was His - **Total Coverage: 1 minute, 45 seconds**
2. Hunter Email on Ukraine Awfully Specific, Raises Questions About His Access to Classified Docs In Biden House- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
3. Hunter Email Offered to Sell Intel on Russian Oligarchs to Alcoa- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
4. Hunter Had a Home Office in Same Delaware House as Classified Documents- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
5. Joe Biden’s Niece Offered $85K Job from Major Biden Donor, She Called it “Below Minimum Wage”- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
6. Joe Biden Named In Email Found on Hunter Laptop In Seeking Multi-Million Dollar Natural Gas Deal with China- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
7. Hunter Allegedly Refused to Pay Female Assistant, Unless She Sent Him Nude Pics- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
8. Hunter Had Access to Joe’s Corvette That Was Garaged Next to Classified Docs- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
9. Former Intel Official Admits He Thought Hunter Laptop Story Was Real But Signed Letter Disavowing It Anyway- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**
10. Hunter’s Art Dealer Stonewalls House GOP Investigation- **Total Coverage:****0 seconds**

Any one of these stories would’ve been widely covered if it was a Republican President’s son, but the left-wing media has been almost completely silent.

I am counting on you to help us reach our $10,000 goal before March to expose the radical left-wing media. Your support empowers MRC to expose liars in the media, spread the truth, and ultimately save Free Speech.

[_**Click here to show your support and help us**_ _**DEFEAT the left-wing media**_ _** >>>**_](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbujau5sl6meo6a89c4a90fq0hfhfcgbasjnhn0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chim9o36chh2bs)

_If you and I allow the mainstream media to censor stories as important to America’s security as this, what else will they try to get away with?_

We cannot allow the left-wing media to destroy our Republic, determine our elections, enact socialism, or brainwash our children. That’s why I’m asking for your support.

When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the left-wing media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America’s trust in the left-wing media -- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the media anymore.

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Republicans Kill Tax Reform
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| It’s been a tough year in the Mississippi legislature for Conservatives. We started this year being hopeful that real conservative legislation like a full personal income tax elimination bill would be passed into law. But in the moderate at best MS Legislature, hoping for a full income tax elimination was apparently a pipe dream. On Wednesday of this week, a proposed bill that would have taken steps towards a complete personal income tax elimination in the state was discussed in the MS House of Representatives among the Republicans in Caucus meetings, and it was Republicans, not Democrats, that fought the bill to its ultimate demise. The bill would have required a 3/5 majority vote for passage, meaning all Republicans in the MS House of Representatives would need to vote in favor of the bill for it to pass. Surely no Republican would fight against a tax cut, right? The MS GOP’s platform states in clear language that we should support the reduction of the tax burden for our citizens: Mississippi Republicans believe that people, not the government, know best how to spend their own money. When people keep more of their hard-earned money, jobs and economic growth will flourish in the free market system. Mississippi Republicans support the reduction of the tax burden on our citizens. We believe in the reduction of taxes to empower taxpayers, to create a more competitive environment for job creation, to incentivize work, entrepreneurship, and investment, and to prevent the excessive growth of government. But it was a dozen Republicans’ betrayal of our Party’s platform of cutting taxes that killed the only chance of an income tax elimination bill this year. It’s apparent that at least a dozen Republicans in the MS House of Representatives are either unaware of their own party’s platform, or they are deliberately hostile to it.
---
|
---
| The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is the only group of legislators who fight every day for your rights and freedom. But, we need your help!Please consider financially supporting the Mississippi Freedom Caucus so we can continue the fight in the Mississippi legislature.

When a Christian group spread the word of Christ to millions in an ad during the game last Sunday, AOC took to Twitter to slam it.
She called Christ's Holy Word "fascist."

The anti-God Woke Mob has never had a victory like this.
They're foaming at the mouth to humiliate Christians all across the country.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Do you support non-Americans voting in our elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62354968:J9vBI7GbN:m:1:3331421248:726B084F504282DF4A0E73E97979C8E7:r)
|
[**Petition: Do you agree that illegal immigrants should not be allowed to vote in our elections -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62354968:J9vBI7GbN:m:1:3331421248:726B084F504282DF4A0E73E97979C8E7:r)
Peter,

I wanted to share with you another reason why it's so important that we remain ever vigilant and ALWAYS stay in the fight to defend our great country from dangerous and destructive policies.

Just a few days ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a measure making sure that non-citizens are not allowed vote in Washington DC elections.

Sounds like a no-brainer, right? I mean, who the heck would support a crazy idea like non-citizens voting in American elections?

I'll tell you who would support it: the vast majority of House Democrats would! **And they did! By a 4-to-1 margin!**

Despite their incessant anti-Trump tropes being laden with claims of foreign influence in elections, they call it controversial for conservatives to say that only American citizens should vote in American elections. I'm not making this up!

We all know that liberals want to fundamentally change our great country, and this latest move fits their playbook to a tee. They want weaker border security, they don't support law enforcement, and now they have shown they want to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections.

They weren't successful this time, but when considering that Biden's border policy is allowing record levels of illegal immigration, and Democrats are raising record levels of money for their campaigns, we should all be scared for the future of our country if the left makes gains in the next election.

I know you receive a lot of fundraising emails, but if you've read this far, I know you share my concern. **[If that's true, I'm asking you to step up and take action to let me know you join with other patriots like yourself to support the fundamental principles that make America great!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62354968:J9vBI7GbN:m:1:3331421248:726B084F504282DF4A0E73E97979C8E7:r)**

[**Petition: Do you agree that illegal immigrants should not be allowed to vote in our elections -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62354968:J9vBI7GbN:m:1:3331421248:726B084F504282DF4A0E73E97979C8E7:r)
**[Please take less than one minute and sign my petition letting me know you're with me on this!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62354968:J9vBI7GbN:m:1:3331421248:726B084F504282DF4A0E73E97979C8E7:r)**

God Bless,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62354968:J9vBI7GbN:m:1:3331421248:726B084F504282DF4A0E73E97979C8E7:r)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62354968:J9vBI7GbN:m:1:3331421248:726B084F504282DF4A0E73E97979C8E7:r)

---

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015

name: Greater Georgia
subject: GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT IN SUPPORT OF NEW BILL TO BAN OUTSIDE FUNDING OF ELECTIONS
disclaimer_text: paid for by special or partisan interests
body:
| | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 23
GREATER GEORGIA ISSUES STATEMENT IN SUPPORT OF NEW BILL TO BAN OUTSIDE FUNDING OF ELECTIONS
ATLANTA - Today, former U.S. Senator and Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler issued a statement in support of [SB 222](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NcRVvgHi6GIN9wjCufmBjdCs_5DuOHg6R2YkcbI8OdGzdYDL_9AGO5jldtU6qMrqum_yFXX_gHjtVJVN7BGlwHGMlow6OdNIzDoaEI5dkFz6_xsS754YL605lnTG0QwSF4Yz_4GycVveh0LrIq3Eut3MkOcjp7zur_bHlNxmHyl1ll9iRFdsZsWuoLRSt-tY7PtH2TbpCMkQZnRaO22yw==&c=VbGGNzale3rpiHSNUgk4hMm0nIqkL0Cd0-VqRbUTa1h6R8cKQDbBBw==&ch=zQtLciuEQGD65QK8xGdOc7w1MbuydNSvs3ot-5QEuGq-GJIKsYxdoQ==), a new bill designed to stop the circumvention of existing state law to ensure that no county in Georgia is legally permitted to accept outside money to fund election operations.
The legislation was introduced after Greater Georgia [blew the whistle](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NcRVvgHi6GIN9wjCufmBjdCs_5DuOHg6R2YkcbI8OdGzdYDL_9AGP6KJR8By3y4tQnC97A56ST8tnmWVMJUzrElB7rzmSeRR9uQn7CvsC8s1rQhxuVAp6LRlhEv75aURR0ztNiD7S-I0WCAthpDKMeOULQDyEAAPQDLvDJneQDMvF7mZEAA8DNARol0LCLZG9jdQE2IzBuX5AMGKJaUW8kMmMbxVXa8_F7wy0c_w8GoKl8id7cLr6SWuRBt-dTNaG4Nk6vkk_o=&c=VbGGNzale3rpiHSNUgk4hMm0nIqkL0Cd0-VqRbUTa1h6R8cKQDbBBw==&ch=zQtLciuEQGD65QK8xGdOc7w1MbuydNSvs3ot-5QEuGq-GJIKsYxdoQ==) on DeKalb County - who, earlier this month, covertly sought and then accepted $2 million in grant funding from the U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence. The Alliance is backed by the Center for Tech and Civic Life, which in 2020 [partnered](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NcRVvgHi6GIN9wjCufmBjdCs_5DuOHg6R2YkcbI8OdGzdYDL_9AGPvsJPnUaRhQ9u9rFOkp1CIK-kOOR0WvCLeeiXkxYnT2GD0d3OdTUG8arnEAtkJyljEwKycO58NsXdvupbj3E2Z_kEKAcRWIvOUzF0yFUJoXyV3DuAtJJsSeDM-GXtx7-3EgXDFmhP2LLIYZm5epBWA=&c=VbGGNzale3rpiHSNUgk4hMm0nIqkL0Cd0-VqRbUTa1h6R8cKQDbBBw==&ch=zQtLciuEQGD65QK8xGdOc7w1MbuydNSvs3ot-5QEuGq-GJIKsYxdoQ==) with Mark Zuckerberg to funnel $45 million into boards of election in Georgia - primarily in blue counties.
"What's happening right now in Georgia is crystal clear: ideological groups and certain counties are testing our resolve to enforce state law, while attempting to influence local elections," said Loeffler. "Thankfully, Lt. Governor Burt Jones and our lawmakers have taken swift action to fortify existing laws that ban outside funding for local boards of election through SB 222, which will ensure that our elections are never bought and paid for by special or partisan interests. Greater Georgia is proud to endorse the legislation, and calls for its urgent passage by members of the Georgia General Assembly."
Although Georgia's Election Integrity Act [banned](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NcRVvgHi6GIN9wjCufmBjdCs_5DuOHg6R2YkcbI8OdGzdYDL_9AGO5jldtU6qMrCZ0ndakaTM1IrzYkWvYdXPAYDa52RMj2CMIS8nNXDoa3LDniq65T0h8S4uKh6HFPVX7fniNtcj0JeGScfdS1GMukj6v2EqmXIjOVv_e0Y40XEfetawdsywzfjMZd7YLMkP2nbFLxkB9mbrdOjIi_gg==&c=VbGGNzale3rpiHSNUgk4hMm0nIqkL0Cd0-VqRbUTa1h6R8cKQDbBBw==&ch=zQtLciuEQGD65QK8xGdOc7w1MbuydNSvs3ot-5QEuGq-GJIKsYxdoQ==) local boards of election from accepting outside money in 2021, DeKalb County exploited a loophole in the law last month. As one DeKalb official reportedly [explained](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016NcRVvgHi6GIN9wjCufmBjdCs_5DuOHg6R2YkcbI8OdGzdYDL_9AGFMVQM47g9NJaHDIBUvnvFW_MKAntXMk-L0j9UqG_4IN60uUPRYs-4vnyx4Wud19en3PBf2IjIaeeB7QvqtX00RGHALdM-FxOLDYNoHVqgjoYNwQqBB9R9SoWgLJ9PmCA8iduSMV6u7UlQJs3l7d1BZIxM3JBuaAFhgHggEOBCV1lXIZSjzAwS4bFf5nja8Ov5c2zZRIZdprqQiEor2vNJ4=&c=VbGGNzale3rpiHSNUgk4hMm0nIqkL0Cd0-VqRbUTa1h6R8cKQDbBBw==&ch=zQtLciuEQGD65QK8xGdOc7w1MbuydNSvs3ot-5QEuGq-GJIKsYxdoQ==) to a local media outlet: "since election offices are not allowed to receive grants directly, the lengthy application process was led by the county's finance department." SB 222 would enforce the original intent of Georgia's election laws - and ensure that local boards of election are solely funded by taxpayer dollars.
Greater Georgia, launched by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is a 501(c4) nonpartisan nonprofit dedicated to growing participation in the democratic process by mobilizing and empowering voters. The group works year-round to educate and register voters, engage with diverse and underrepresented communities, and protect election integrity.

name: Indiana Republican Party HQ
subject: It's worse than we thought, Hoosier Republican
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
Democrats' shady tactics have come to light. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/109478b8992045cf/8e72a375930a90a8c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican, Late last month, the U.S. Air Force confirmed that they improperly released former First District Republican congressional candidate Jennifer-Ruth Green’s military service records to the DCCC-aligned opposition research firm Due Diligence Group. **But it gets worse.** **Much worse.** On Tuesday,_[Politico](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/109478b8992045cf/e9e0422bc1fe6ce7c3d6b838967d376c/40313) _released a report detailing how a member of Due Diligence Group (and possibly others) **misrepresented** themselves to the Air Force in order to obtain the military service records of **11 Republican candidates** last year. "'Virtually all'” of the 11 unapproved releases were made to the same third party 'who represented himself as a background investigator seeking service records for employment purposes.'"_ _ **This was an abhorrent, systematic effort by Democrats and their cronies at the DCCC to weaponize Republican candidates’ military service records for political gain.** **We can't let them get away with it.** Join us in calling for a U.S. Department of Justice investigation into the matter and **help u s kick Democrats Frank Mrvan and André Carson — the DCCC's favorite two Hoosiers — out of office _for good_.** **[Please, rush a small donation now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/109478b8992045cf/7bafd890016f4f8fc3d6b838967d376c/40313)** — Indiana Republican Party HQ

name: Tim Scott
subject: Prop. Token. Uncle Tim.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
The Left has called me all of the above and they will keep calling me names

| |
---
| | | Prop. Token. The N-word. Even, Uncle Tim.

The Left has called me all of the above and they will keep calling me names simply because I don't agree with their radical agenda.

I believe in the American Dream because I lived it. Growing up with a single mother in poverty, I never believed my family could go from cotton to Congress in one lifetime. But guided by faith in the land of opportunity, I did.

**[I will not stop fighting to keep the American Dream alive, but I need your help to protect it for future generations.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zecaoqgftigtj6i8ng2j98c3n4i20mt0kl0db4oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chhm9ob6cth2bs "I will not stop fighting to keep the American Dream alive, but I need your help to protect it for future generations.")**

The Democrats will do everything they can to undermine me, my experience, and my story because I'm a threat to their narrative. They're more interested in cheap shots and scoring political points than progress. They're more invested in inciting anger and hatred to ensure they win the next election.

**That 's why I need your help. This isn't the first and won't be the last time the Left attacks me for daring to speak out against them. I won't stop fighting, but it's an uphill battle I can't - _and won 't_ - win alone.**

**[If you're able, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, whatever you can to show we won't take this lying down?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4grrdr1q3ev240e4gfboatu31pujq6igfthrh0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chhm9ob6cth2bs "If you’re able, can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, whatever you can to show we won’t take this lying down?")**

They can keep calling me names, but I will never fall in line.

Thank you and God bless,
Tim Scott
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1e5eiliuvdf893goo85t5fglsugr5j4u90ietf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chhm9ob6cth2bs)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _**
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zioqifv20ip5b9ks5qg3dp2sr3fomr9o51uqfeo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chhm9ob6cth2bs "Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**

---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqbqmrsvg71cg9qa0oegqh4hpgpqqcnokjvpa5r0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chhm9ob6cth2bs "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---
| | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE

CHARLESTON, SC 29407

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z16ff51qbr31iunl5f7fhk9fn2h6i658scum45uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chjm0or1cph2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the nation's highest court: **" My job is to apply the Constitution."**

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zign0b0lavqu561b10am0digg3sf6l6mibvooq08_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chjm0or1cph2bs) [NO](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0lde2b8iovh3741434niih50qkb1p8lnon52hb8_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chjm0or1cph2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfkc4bil23i6dmubil2a9poj42md7831kopqbm0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chjm0or1cph2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty--featuring issues such as "Clarence Thomas and the Lost Constitution."

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zc12hqobv6gqdq2om5jgogjf6h8p1htquoto9b8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chjm0or1cph2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Deroy Murdock, [please use this preferences page](http://e.deroymurdock.com/prefs/9z2z17g85rb1bc0le7s19cudsvrotiet9ldo4p91oag).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z850s2sfnp5fm09dmatooplh2h39t0q4ep16hs48_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7cti6eo33c5j649fg)

name: AOTL
subject: what will redistricting look like over the next ten years?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

The All On The Line team and our volunteers have helped make redistricting fair by demanding accountability and testifying during the process -- and stood by voters in states who filed lawsuits to prevent egregious gerrymandering.
What will redistricting look like over the next ten years? Want to know how you can take action now and next year?

clean_body: | The All On The Line team and our volunteers have helped make redistricting fair by demanding accountability and testifying during the process -- and stood by voters in states who filed lawsuits to prevent egregious gerrymandering. What will redistricting look like over the next ten years? Want to know how you can take action now and next year? During the sessions, attendees will learn: ☑️ where redistricting is still taking place, ☑️ information on how the redistricting process works, ☑️ why redistricting is important to you and your community, ☑️ and the differences between "redistricting" and "gerrymandering." This is an opportunity to discover how the redistricting process works in states like yours and how you can get involved to make a difference for the next generation. \-- All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. subject: “At 11 in handcuffs. Now, Maryland’s first Black governor.”
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59141399/393348349/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzZiZmI5NC05ZWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1E57ziAeXAnRL-QE-qurHN472knu11pocrQlEppd4wI=&emci=f56bfb94-9eb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fc6bfb94-9eb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)

Team, This week, **USA Today published a profile of Wes** , highlighting his story of overcoming obstacles early on in life to later become the first Black governor of Maryland. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59141400/393348350/671691342?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzZiZmI5NC05ZWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1E57ziAeXAnRL-QE-qurHN472knu11pocrQlEppd4wI=&emci=f56bfb94-9eb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fc6bfb94-9eb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
---
When asked if his younger self envisioned this future, Wes said, "At 11, I was in handcuffs, so no.” Wes struggled in childhood after losing his father to a treatable illness. After getting into trouble for graffiti, Wes was sent to military school at age 13.
With the sacrifice and support of others like his grandparents, mother, and teachers, he ultimately went on to become a U.S. Army captain, Rhodes Scholar, small business owner, and leader at one of the nation’s largest poverty-fighting organizations, as well as a loving husband and father.
Wes has made it his life’s mission to “leave no one behind,” and that’s what he’s putting into practice now as Governor of Maryland. His life and his history-making election prove that _progress is possible when we come together._
[**You can read the full feature about Wes’ story and his place in history here →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59141401/393348351/671691342?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzZiZmI5NC05ZWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1E57ziAeXAnRL-QE-qurHN472knu11pocrQlEppd4wI=&emci=f56bfb94-9eb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fc6bfb94-9eb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=24635485)
— Team Moore-Miller

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Re: Tucker Carlson’s Jan. 6 footage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
You deserve the facts – all of the facts.

| |
---
| | | **Kevin McCarthy gives Tucker Carlson access to Jan. 6 riot surveillance tapes**
**_NEW YORK POST_**
You deserve the facts - _all_ of the facts.

I promised I would give you the truth regarding January 6th, and now I am delivering. I have released the full 44,000 hours of uncut camera surveillance footage.

It is in the public interest to know everything that happened that day - not just the narrative that Pelosi's partisan committee wanted you to see ahead of the 2022 midterm elections...

We made a Commitment to America - a commitment to YOU - when we asked for your vote last fall. A commitment to ALL of America requires truth and transparency over partisan games. Now, we are delivering.
**Would you consider chipping in $5, $10, or $25 to help House Republicans keep delivering on our commitments to America?**

---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=9D=97=EF=B8=8FMASSIVE_PETITION_via_Left_Action?=
subject: Add your name to EXPEL Marjorie Taylor Greene from Congress >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Expel Marjorie Taylor Greene for advocating states to secede from the US >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T025e50f0-2645-47c0-af14-199d60545cfa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4d7740c2-6c78-4fe6-959f-3864ad5fb8b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | This week, conspiracy theorist and Trump fanatic Marjorie Taylor Greene called for the US to have a “national divorce” to separate red and blue states. This is just the latest in a long list of reasons why Marjorie Taylor Greene has GOT TO GO. Former vice-chair of the Jan 6 Committee, Liz Cheney, put it best: "Our country is governed by the Constitution. You swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. Secession is unconstitutional. No member of Congress should advocate secession, Marjorie.” Greene has no place in the halls of Congress. If you agree, sign our petition to EXPEL her. Expelling a Representative requires a two-thirds vote -- that means we really need massive numbers to dial up the public pressure. Look, what Greene is doing is not normal, and it only becomes normal if we throw up our hands and say we can’t do anything about it. We need a massive public outcry, and we need people across America to say ENOUGH. [Add your name now to demand Marjorie Taylor Greene be expelled from Congress for advocating for states to secede from the US! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T825904c3-12b8-45c8-896b-467493813b33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

This is just the latest in a long list of reasons why Marjorie Taylor Greene has GOT TO GO. Former vice-chair of the Jan 6 Committee, Liz Cheney, put it best: "Our country is governed by the Constitution. You swore an oath to support and defend the Constitution. Secession is unconstitutional. No member of Congress should advocate secession, Marjorie.” Greene has no place in the halls of Congress. If you agree, sign our petition to EXPEL her. Expelling a Representative requires a two-thirds vote -- that means we really need massive numbers to dial up the public pressure. Look, what Greene is doing is not normal, and it only becomes normal if we throw up our hands and say we can’t do anything about it. We need a massive public outcry, and we need people across America to say ENOUGH. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action (P.S. - you are getting this because you have supported Democratic actions and candidates in the past. But if you would rather not get these any more, just click on the "unsubscribe" link below) | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: The Tennessee Voter Project Website Launched Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
February 23, 2022
Dear friend,
Today, we are pleased to launch the Tennessee Voter Project website for 2023. Please visit our site to learn more about the Tennessee Voter Project
and how you can help. We'll be identifying progressive candidates all around the state who are worthy of support and who pledge to use their time and talents to lift up the needs of working families.
CHECK OUT TVP'S NEW WEBSITE [www.tennesseevoterproject.com]
Since our founding we've raised thousands of dollars and reached thousands of voters to successfully elect some of the most progressive candidates we've seen in Shelby County. In 2022, Shelby County ousted Republicans out of every Countywide seat.
The work didn't start there. It won't end there.
Shelby County can serve as a model for the rest of the state. TVP will be working hard to make Tennessee the Progressive Center of the South. Please consider donating to support this work in 2023 and beyond. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Rethink! GOP
subject: Introducing Rethink! GOP: The Largest Ballot Harvesting and Early Voting Initiative in the Nation
body:
You don't want to miss this.
| | |
---
|
---
| Introducing Rethink! GOP: The Largest Ballot Harvesting and Early Voting Initiative in the Nation
---
| Dear Friend,
I am writing to introduce Rethink! GOP, a new nationwide super PAC that is focused on promoting early voting and ballot harvesting initiatives across the country. Our mission is to engage voters and ensure that their voices are heard in the upcoming elections.
Rethink! GOP is the largest initiative of its kind in the nation. Our team of experienced political operatives and campaign professionals is dedicated to making it easier for voters to participate in the democratic process, and we believe that our efforts can help drive turnout and make a meaningful impact in the upcoming election.

---
---
We are reaching out to you because we believe that you share our commitment to promoting civic engagement and supporting grassroots initiatives. We would be honored to have your support in our efforts to help more voters cast their ballots early and participate in the democratic process.
We believe that YOU will be critical to our overall success, and we are confident that with your support, we can make a real difference in 2024. We look forward to working with you to help promote early voting and ballot harvesting initiatives across the country.
Thank you for your time and consideration. We would be happy to provide you with more information about Rethink! GOP and our efforts to promote civic engagement and voter turnout.
Best regards,
Robert Duran IV National Executive Director, Rethink! GOP [RethinkGOP.org](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MsayJ8C5MLdny9183RW36pZbSkHfRLtTAQu0T4KMCigrs9sFJxk0BwwPr_ZBBHxDB_OXs4o0AQE7R9Ptan7IVfB1Qxdb2Sx5ON5msFQe9olzZTqoBp7n1HBivMw_uJA6rBMwXkEfcJzCvI7-WlrG0vQDpZT3SRk3lx5vfGWO1pZLEKpTcIwVZ_ni-UenJIDYrTSaxgTCoew=&c=HJ_AHLkJKqlb75PUfCVOkjTmOUPRMQIDMhM2ngjlakOROWVCyE57BQ==&ch=mKXoenmpF-1MqISmu3aHjyJO2amsvZjI1c3TO7IeOKa_Qx8M-mhQjg==)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:

| | | | Republicans only need to win _two_ more seats to retake Senate control, and Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is reporting that they have a clear path to do just that. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | If Democrats are going to build up enough resources to defeat the GOP and Republicans' megadonor allies, we need grassroots supporters like you to step up with key early investments. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | **But time is running out before our midnight fundraising deadline, and we're still falling way short of our $15,000 goal.** |

clean_body: | | | Friend, with Democrats hanging onto our Senate majority by a thread, here are three critical things you need to know: | | | | Republicans only need to win two more seats to retake Senate control, and Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is reporting that they have a clear path to do just that. | ---|---|---|--- | | | | If Democrats are going to build up enough resources to defeat the GOP and Republicans' megadonor allies, we need grassroots supporters like you to step up with key early investments. | ---|---|---|--- | | | | But time is running out before our midnight fundraising deadline, and we're still falling way short of our $15,000 goal. | ---|---|---|--- The only way we can close this gap in time and keep the Senate blue is with an immediate surge in grassroots support. That's why we pulled your supporter record, friend, and here's what we found: | | = SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com DONATED TODAY TO DEFEND THE SENATE? NO SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 | | = = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and the GOP only has to flip two of them to deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:

---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do you know what your kids are watching? Children's entertainment on streaming channels like YouTube Kids must be safe for children, right? WRONG! The hidden dangers lurking on one of the most popular media platforms for kids-YouTube Kids-cannot be ignored. It's alarming but true, YouTube Kids is exposing children to sexually explicit and inappropriate content, despite YouTube Kids claiming to provide a "family-friendly" environment. For too long, we've been turning a blind eye, asking ourselves, "How bad can it be?" Meanwhile, our kids are being bombarded with dangerous, inappropriate ideas about sex and gender.
---
[**Help PragerU protect our kids**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[**Donate now**](http://trk.readactnews.-cA)
---
It's hard to believe that a kids media network is intentionally harming children, but we have hard-hitting evidence that YouTube Kids is peddling predatory propaganda. PragerU personality Aldo Buttazzoni-who is making national headlines for exposing the truth about "family-friendly" drag shows-investigated what would happen if a 9-year-old child created a YouTube Kids account. What he discovered was horrifying.
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
| | One of the first videos that YouTube Kids recommends to 9-year-old children is titled, "Kids Meet a Gender Non-Conforming Person." A prominent channel on YouTube Kids is "Queer Kid Stuff," where videos describe in detail the sexual identity of each letter in the LGBTQ+ acronym and teach children to "Learn About CONSENT!" These YouTube Kids content creators use keywords like **"preschoolers," "toddler," and "stuffed animal"** for online searches. Obviously, these videos are not only intended for confused teens and preteens. [**PragerU is sounding the alarm. Our children are at risk. It's time to wake up to the truth and fight back. **](http://trk.readactnews._0QYBrIJatYPve2Q)

YouTube Kids shows crazy, inappropriate videos to children, yet YouTube continues to restrict hundreds of PragerU videos, including our videos on the Ten Commandments. Apparently, the Ten Commandments aren't appropriate for kids, but sexually-charged content is![](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
**YouTube Kids is not safe for children**

But this is NOT how YouTube Kids advertises itself. They claim to "give kids a more contained environment filled with family-friendly videos." Does YouTube Kids include images of "Queer Kid Stuff" in its advertisements? Of course not!

Your 100% tax-deductible donation to PragerU today will:](http://trk.readactnews.)**
* Help us educate the masses about this issue
* Enable us to make more hard-hitting content and spread awareness to millions
* Allow PragerU Kids to reach more American families with wholesome, educational, entertaining kids content

We must act now. Our children are counting on us. Please join in the fight with a generous gift today. Warmly, Your PragerU team

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: A real, human person wrote this email
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Can we be completely honest with you for a second?
#

Peter -
Can we be completely honest with you for a second?
We know you probably receive a constant stream of emails and text messages from political campaigns.
And we know it can be frustrating.
We know it because a real person wrote this email — a Marine Corps veteran like Ruben, and a human who gets all these emails and texts just like you.
But these... from Ruben’s campaign... they are different.
They are different because unlike most other campaigns, this one is funded by lots and lots of people making small donations.
Unlike most other campaigns, most of our donations come from emails like this one.
So when you see Ruben leading in the polls, when you see our ads up, when you see our organizing operation, when you see Ruben WIN, it’s emails like these that make it happen.
THAT is why we have to ask. Because the consistent response to the emails, $5, $10 and $20 at a time fund this campaign. And that’s a small price to pay to have a Senator who doesn’t have to beg hedge fund managers for money.
[**Can you PLEASE contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate before our end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close in just a few days? Reaching our goals is so important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230223-1-30-b&t=29&akid=416%2E734936%2EkdPNyC)

name: Larry Hogan
subject: This is categorically wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
| | | Dear fellow American, The division seems to be getting worse in Washington, D.C. and we have to be a louder, united opposing voice. The recent extreme rhetoric about a "national divorce" between red states and blue states is categorically _**wrong.**_ _**What our country needs is national unity and civil discourse, not a national divorce.**_ We have to find common ground. It's up to us to end the toxic politics and to stop seeing our country as red states or blue states... but as the _**UNITED STATES. **_ [**Please join me and An America United as we take on the extreme rhetoric by making a contribution of $10 or whatever you can give. This mission is too important to ignore and we need you.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=22ec802c629647adae7ad080a1a55f91&_e=o4jAl4zCPQuKmTVOmd0iaklv-jpRvGryz_ePTIdx0q2wLG1d-XZrvHgWPVOtHm2AqJP8D1VUE8etbWFc6J4ueb8wVDb_Q9hJQYc3vdLc-A5C0zjifgSxOoKApmRP6jz4FzuYmkJw_-YOgMwB-l6XJcvbzwGEuEQmQQlZXjjl19Gza37HVROYYPKTaqVQ1KxQnad18J0yxl_2IZBiXPp8wTSDIISyQolwHb4bp78TpoqgD0DsAkhGa4C_B_RntGjiVJCpVt5Jaeu-oqKdlLvxZQ%3D%3D) As leaders in the exhausted majority of Americans, we _**MUST**_ come together to build a better path forward in our country. Thank you, **Larry Hogan** _Former Governor of Maryland_

name: Congresswoman Harriet Hageman
subject: pathetic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
These Democrats... it’s pathetic –

These Democrats... it’s pathetic –
|
---
| | | Friend -

**House Republicans JUST held a live, in-person Congressional hearing about border security in Yuma, Arizona.** We believe the American People need to see what's really happening at our southern border, not just hear about it from a hearing in Washington DC.

This was our single biggest opportunity to bring national attention to an urgent problem for our country - _and guess what? _

**EVERY SINGLE DEMOCRAT BOYCOTTED IT! **

_**[It's pathetic. I'm furious so I set a goal of raising another $50,000 to make these weak, open-border Democrats REGRET refusing to show up. If we can rally that kind of pressure in the wake of our border security hearing, it will send a message they cannot ignore.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdin1ur0lh2me9p58l0u4k9ohu94iv7sgpa2e0vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chge0ob6cdh2bs "It’s pathetic. I’m furious so I set a goal of raising another $50,000 to make these weak, open-border Democrats REGRET refusing to show up. If we can rally that kind of pressure in the wake of our border security hearing, it will send a message they cannot ignore.")**_

Can you help?
---
| | | [DEFEAT THESE OPEN-BORDER DEMOCRATS](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z85s631mlum649iqum32do96grn0nrk5qebfb53g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chge0ob6cdh2bs "DEFEAT THESE OPEN-BORDER DEMOCRATS")
---
Despite these Democrats not showing up for work, House Republicans are 100% committed to:

_**1)** Standing up to the drug cartels, **2)** Blocking amnesty for illegals, **3)** Stopping fentanyl from flowing into our country, **4)** Defending our border patrol agents, **5)** And securing our border for good! _

We won't stop fighting. We won't buckle under pressure. We won't bend the knee to these open-border Democrats.

_**[If you're with us, I'm personally asking you to make a small donation toward our goal to defeat these weak Democrats once and for all.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6j1guvsmgbc3qc2v9ng5fgao17a3l8lm3qi5moo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chge0ob6cdh2bs "If you’re with us, I’m personally asking you to make a small donation toward our goal to defeat these weak Democrats once and for all. ")**_

God bless you,
Harriet Hageman

name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

As we approach February's end-of-month deadline, I’m hoping you’ll help us
reach a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to pay. I want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18892?t=1001&akid=3004%2E346206%2EfNtNCf ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18892?t=1002&akid=3004%2E346206%2EfNtNCf ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230223-3004-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3004_346206_fNtNCf&akid=3004%2E346206%2EfNtNCf

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3004%2E346206%2EfNtNCf

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky. Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will win. But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of donations we received, national support never came. [ ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to make a contribution. I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to go. Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m excited to move on to what’s next. Charles Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Voters are tired of extremism
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
If we are constantly going from extreme to extreme the average person suffers.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/174?t=1&akid=21%2E135344%2E1mvWNE)
Friend -
In the 2022 elections across the country, voters made it clear that they are tired of one thing: extremism.
And yet, here in Michigan, Republicans just doubled down on that losing formula. This last weekend, the Michigan GOP elected its new chair, Kristina Karamo, who peddles conspiracy, division, and extreme rhetoric. She _still_ refuses to concede her 14-point loss in the 2022 Secretary of State race, calling it a “fraudulent” election.
This same extreme ideology also prevents some elected leaders in Washington from even being willing to come to the table to discuss how to keep our kids safe from gun violence. Gun violence is the leading cause of death for children under 21, and yet many are unwilling to even have a negotiation on what we can do to protect families.
That’s why Elissa continues to run by being the voice of reason and focusing on the issues that affect people’s everyday lives: their pocketbooks and their kids.
**If you support Elissa and want to continue seeing a voice of reason for Michiganders in Washington, then we have just one ask:**
[**Will you chip in $10 today to help Elissa continue delivering common sense solutions for Michiganders? Elissa’s campaigns have always been powered by people giving what they can, when they can.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb23.fIJRPL&refcode=em230223-1-25000&t=2&akid=21%2E135344%2E1mvWNE)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-feb23.fIJRPL&refcode=em230223-1-25000&t=3&akid=21%2E135344%2E1mvWNE)**
Thank you for being a member of this team!
Team Slotkin

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=21%2E135344%2E1mvWNE).

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

subject: Lauren Boebert, George Santos… and who else?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | Let us know, Peter. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59131242/393310725/-1521738273?sourceid=1048661&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjE4M2RhZC04YWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTk_1lDUj71nPp0aNRHHOYfsborktA8I6HlRQWLpmBA=&emci=bba64704-2cb2-ed11-994d-00224832e1ba&emdi=5f183dad-8ab3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Peter,

body:
Will you help my friend?

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvk5f73safbjg3r2lvbeulba3r8k710o8225usm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chge4pr7c3h2bs)

Friend,

I was reading the news this morning and came across an article that made my skin crawl.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5aab54us0emhivgs5nora8oum3bduqcci3aiajg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chge4pr7c3h2bs)
This is no joke, Friend. The radical left is poised to spend **BILLIONS** (yes, you read that right) of dollars on electing socialist candidates all across the country.

The war they are waging is far-reaching, and nothing is off the table. From local school-board elections to the White House, they won't rest until they've re-shaped every aspect of our lives to fit their agenda. And they have their Hollywood donors to back them up and their Big Tech cronies to shut us down. That is why it is so important that we stand up to them and win.

We can't do that unless we have a mass of conservative warriors ready to lead the charge. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Friend. **I want to talk to you about my best friend in the Senate, John Barrasso. **

John is a Senator from Wyoming, and he's one of the few people in Washington fighting, day and night, against the leftist woke ideology. He's in the trenches with me to hold China accountable, defend the Second Amendment, advance school choice, and he is DEMANDING American energy independence. _**He 's the sort of guy that belongs in the Senate.**_

But he needs your help, Friend. With the left's tsunami of spending coming our way, John needs your help to make sure Republicans are ready to hit back and hit back hard.
**[Please, if you're able, can you chip in $5, $10, $25, or any amount that you can to help us take on the left? >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9lt874ob3vgl41cb9g4ct9dtp8bjto74dic5vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chge4pr7c3h2bs)**

It might not seem like much, but I promise your support will make the difference between who controls the power in Washington.

clean_body: We can't allow this! | | | | | It's official, my friend! We have a left-wing climate activist in the Governor's mansion. Rather than lowering taxes during a crippling period of inflation, Walz is focused on pleasing East Coast liberals. Walz has signed an energy bill into law that will cost taxpayers significantly more, making it harder than it already is for so many Americans to pay their bills. With radicals like Ilhan Omar and Tim Walz in leadership, I'm taking a stand for Minnesota families and those who need relief now. We can't afford to leave an entire generation behind in the pursuit of green energy products that can't keep up with our reliable fossil fuels that make up nearly half of our domestic energy consumption. Despite our best efforts, renewable energy sources only account for 29% of our energy needs. It is impossible to increase that to 100% without causing skyrocketing costs for consumers. These are just the facts. Minnesota needs relief now. Thank you, Brad Finstad | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3nclua1oo7oi22aq70bboo43f3kg28j0fntk95g_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chgeco34slh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpbjb3de0v4hjmr7ar0ot0ms1cia0jlepubugv10_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chgeco34slh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztpfjent005q10a2t323off7k2j8ejs2nda21238_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chgeco34slh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbt8t5cng16otfhekj5vtpkps9gue2beithd302o_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chgeco34slh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Don’t Let the Left Corrupt Our Elections!
body:
We file more “open records” lawsuits than any other organization in America...and over the past 29 years, we have broken through government secrecy on scandals ranging from Hillary Clinton’s emails to Biden family corruption issues!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

This is a very serious and urgent matter, so please hear me out.
Joe Biden and his radical allies are determined to open our voting booths to illegal aliens and other ineligible individuals ...which may help corrupt politicians steal elections _this year and in 2024_!
Judicial Watch has the tools and the track record to challenge them...but [we need your help!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

_Believe me ...voter fraud is real_!

For example, not long ago in **Texas** the Secretary of State announced that a departmental investigation uncovered _tens of thousands of ballots cast by illegal aliens in the past 4 years_ , although under federal law, foreign nationals (legal and illegal aliens) are not eligible to vote in American elections.

At Judicial Watch, we believe that voting is a highly valued right and serious responsibility of American citizenship. That commitment has put us on a long-term collision course with the radical open borders Left... _and that includes the radical Biden administration_.

You see, **Joe Biden** , liberals in Congress and the massive **George Soros** network are totally committed to "remaking" America through the electoral process.

Judicial Watch can help stop them...but [we need your financial support now!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_One key component of their plan is to generate illegal votes from foreign nationals, so they believe that keeping our borders open to illegal immigration and allowing illegal aliens to vote will boost vote totals for candidates of the Left_****.**

**_What other explanation can there be for the Biden administration 's abject failure to protect our borders and our national sovereignty_****?**

Consider these numbers...

Last year, the **U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP)** agency reported that March "border encounters" with illegal immigrants numbered **_221,303_** ...a whopping 33% increase over February's total!

Contrast that **221,303** with the **_50,000_** "encounters" reported in August 2020...when Donald Trump was still president!

**Here are worse numbers**.

On September 30th, 2022, the CPB reported that during the course of that fiscal year just over **2.76****million** "border encounters" had occurred...compared to just over **1.95 million** the previous year. **_That 's a 41% increase in "border encounters" in one year_**! What a shameful record.

There is _only one reason_ why the Biden administration gutted nearly all of the positive border security enforcement measures instituted by **President Donald Trump 's** administration:

_And it is the same reason_ why **Joe Biden** and his **Department of Justice** are attacking states that are passing commonsense laws like voter ID to ensure honest elections and make certain _that only eligible U.S. citizens are allowed to vote_!

**The reason is this: Joe Biden and his radical leftist allies want to create a massive new pool of voters ... _specifically including aliens who are in the United States illegally ...whom they believe will overwhelmingly vote for candidates supported by the Left._**

**_Y_**** _our vote and the lawful votes of fellow American citizens must not be cancelled by illegal votes and other corruptions of our voting rights_**

As you know**,** Judicial Watch is non-partisan and does not endorse or oppose candidates for public office. But we will not stand by and permit election integrity safeguards to be violated for the gain of any political faction.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Of course, it's easy to complain about the Left's efforts to make it easier for illegal aliens to vote in our elections...... _but**Judicial Watch** does far more than complain_!

Over the past several years, **Judicial Watch** attorneys have scored a remarkable series of courtroom victories in upholding the rule of law and honest elections.

* In **Florida** , we threatened legal action that led to state election officials removing more than 50,000 deceased voters from their voter rolls.

* In **Missouri** and **West Virginia** warning letters from **Judicial Watch** were enough to succeed in spurring election officials in those states to begin cleaning their voter rolls.

* In **Pennsylvania** and **South Carolina,** we successfully defended voter ID laws in court.

* Our lawsuits in **California** , **Ohio** and **Indiana** led to more accurate voter rolls and other specific actions that protect against voter fraud.

* We are currently suing **Colorado** and **Pennsylvania** over their voter rolls, and we settled our lawsuits against **New York City** and **North Carolina** after those jurisdictions removed more than **800,000** ineligible names from their voter rolls!

* And last year we went to court in **Maryland** , and successfully challenged and overturned a "hyper-partisan" Democratic congressional redistricting gerrymander scheme that violated well-established congressional redistricting principles.

_You see, where others talk,_**_Judicial Watch_** _acts_! _And with real impact_!

This is indeed a critical battle...for the rule of law, and for the future of our nation.

**[So I urge you to join the Judicial Watch team today to help me and our team of talented investigators and attorneys challenge and stop left-wing efforts to corrupt our elections.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

The Left doesn't care about illegal immigration's potential to undermine our electoral process, or the disrespect it shows for the rule of law.

They only care about power, and for them the quickest way to get to power is to make it as easy as possible for illegal aliens and other ineligible individuals to vote in our elections.

_So,[I urge you to make your very best contribution to **Judicial Watch** today_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580).We simply will not be able to continue to fight as effectively as we do against **Joe Biden** , powerful politicians on Capitol Hill, government lawyers and **George Soros** -funded leftist groups without the committed and generous help of more patriotic Americans like you._

Thank you in advance for giving your support for Judicial Watch!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62319&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

|

|

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Congress to expand Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
#
Friend,
For more than 80 years, Social Security has paid out critical benefits owed to millions of Americans—Americans like my parents, who are retired and rely on Social Security today.
They are not alone, nearly 40 percent of seniors rely on Social Security for a majority of their income. And 1 in every 7 seniors rely on it for more than 90 percent of their income.
Social Security is essential for the well-being of tens of millions of seniors, as well as people with disabilities. Yet the average Social Security benefit is only $1,688 a month. That’s barely enough to keep up with the rising cost of living.
[**Take action: Tell Congress to expand Social Security and help seniors retire with dignity**.](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11294?t=6&akid=2623%2E946728%2EhMpbKH)
Along with cost-of-living adjustments, the Social Security Expansion Act of 2023 would increase benefits by $2,400 a year, extend the solvency of Social Security for 75 years by requiring the wealthy to pay their fair share of taxes, and make other improvements to this essential program.
[**Sign the petition: Become a grassroots endorser of the Social Security Expansion Act of 2023!**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11294?t=7&akid=2623%2E946728%2EhMpbKH)
In solidarity,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ro-em-footer?refcode=em20230223-2623-footer&t=8&refcode2=2623_946728_hMpbKH&akid=2623%2E946728%2EhMpbKH)**
---
[](https://facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA) | [](https://twitter.com/RoKhanna)
Email us: [info@rokhanna.com](mailto: info@rokhanna.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Ro for Congress, PO Box 3513, Santa Clara, CA 95051.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.rokhanna.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2623%2E946728%2EhMpbKH)

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: another chance on this survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t responded to my February Priorities Survey, **and I’m planning to follow up with the results of this survey in the next couple of days.**
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work in the months ahead, the initial response was overwhelming. **That’s why we’ve decided to re-open this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will only remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight.**
Peter, I vow to do whatever it takes to fight for the safety and security of you and your loved ones, but I can only do this if I know where your priorities lie.
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my February Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-priorities-0223](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59136934/393331212/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk985-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTM0MWRkMy05M2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO9x2rkimASe3zBKpizLaGXVVM0OL-87YRmLmPzRjlY=&emci=74c550cf-14af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4a341dd3-93b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you for your help here.

Letitia James

---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Fri, Feb 10, 2023
Subject: What are your priorities, Peter?
| | |
---
| | **FEBRUARY 2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59136935/393331220/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk985-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTM0MWRkMy05M2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO9x2rkimASe3zBKpizLaGXVVM0OL-87YRmLmPzRjlY=&emci=74c550cf-14af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4a341dd3-93b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.

I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. I received my full education, kindergarten through college, from the New York City public school system. And, throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were directly affecting me and my family.

**You might be wondering why I’m telling you this, and the answer is simple: I know what it is like to feel voiceless.**
That’s why, when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black lawmaker ever to serve as New York’s attorney general, I vowed to never let another person feel the same way – and that’s why I created my priorities survey.

**[Peter, I’m proud to put the people’s priorities first, but to do that effectively, I need to know what your concerns are. So please, will you take my February Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59136936/393331232/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk985-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTM0MWRkMy05M2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO9x2rkimASe3zBKpizLaGXVVM0OL-87YRmLmPzRjlY=&emci=74c550cf-14af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4a341dd3-93b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59136937/393331233/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk985-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTM0MWRkMy05M2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO9x2rkimASe3zBKpizLaGXVVM0OL-87YRmLmPzRjlY=&emci=74c550cf-14af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4a341dd3-93b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
I know that Democrats were able to win big in the 2022 elections – but our work is nowhere near complete. This year, we are still fighting for abortion to be safe and accessible to all, we are still fighting against voter suppression laws that are eerily similar to those seen during the Jim Crow era, and we are still losing too many loved ones to gun violence.

Peter, I vow to never stop fighting until all people who live in America are protected, but I need your help. With the political landscape drastically different today than it was four months ago, I need to know which fights to prioritize this year – and that’s where you come in.

**I’m looking for 1,000 fearless fighters to step up now and complete my survey before midnight, but it looks like I’m still missing your response, Peter. So please:[Will you take 60 seconds now to share your top priorities with my team so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59136938/393331234/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk985-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTM0MWRkMy05M2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO9x2rkimASe3zBKpizLaGXVVM0OL-87YRmLmPzRjlY=&emci=74c550cf-14af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4a341dd3-93b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59136939/393331235/342494365?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=25&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk985-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTM0MWRkMy05M2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SO9x2rkimASe3zBKpizLaGXVVM0OL-87YRmLmPzRjlY=&emci=74c550cf-14af-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4a341dd3-93b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=25369504)
---
Thank you for making your voice heard.

Letitia
