| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/brysongillette/a-new-generation-of-leadership-319315?e=1012843e9c)
---
[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=d18773a44d&e=1012843e9c)
Dear Friend,
I’m excited to endorse Nick Melvoin and hope you’ll join me in [supporting his campaign](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=3b6ebf83b2&e=1012843e9c)! As one of of the youngest members of Congress, I can tell you we could use more common sense problem solvers in D.C. Nick will be a partner and ally in the fight to bring a new generation of leadership to Washington to work to solve our most intractable problems.
When I first ran for the New York City Council, people said I was “too young and inexperienced, wait your turn.” _But I ran anyway, and won_. Not only making me the youngest elected official in the City, but the first LGBTQ leader ever elected in this district. I passed over 40 pieces of legislation on affordable housing and the opioid epidemic plaguing families throughout our community and secured the largest FEMA investment in city history. When I ran for Congress, I was told the same thing: “wait your turn.” But our communities can’t wait. Now, as one of the youngest leaders in Congress, I continue to work relentlessly advocating for my constituents in Washington.
[**But, I can’t do it alone. I know Nick would be a powerful addition to Congress. Will you chip in $25, $50, or $100 today to elect another rational problem solver?**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=ec874d9ab1&e=1012843e9c)
When I heard Nick’s story, it resonated with me. A young, bold, local teacher serving his community and taking on special interests. Like me, people said he was too young and couldn’t win. _But he ran anyway, and won_. And L.A. is better because of it.
Nick is a policy innovator, a consensus-builder, and a common-sense leader on issues beyond education to the environment, housing, healthcare, and fighting anti-Semitism. Despite being on different coasts, the problems our communities face are not all that different. We must secure affordable housing, quality healthcare, and protect reproductive and LGBTQ+ rights for everyone
[**But, it won’t be easy and we need all the help we can get. Will you join me in supporting the bold leadership Nick will bring to Congress and contribute to his campaign today?**](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=cad1c3e047&e=1012843e9c)
I am proud to endorse Nick for Congress and look forward to working with him to make a real impact. But, we can’t do it without your support!
Thank you!
Ritchie
[](https://nickmelvoin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ecb3c4d83b7c99a9fd895cfd0&id=93a66c8c6c&e=1012843e9c)
_**Nick with Congressman Ritchie Torres**_

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Our hearts go out to the Pine Hills community
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I won’t rest until we see a future free from gun violence in Florida and in every state in our nation.
#

Friends -
Yesterday in the community of Pine Hills, Florida, a TV journalist was shot and killed...while covering another shooting.
A nine-year-old girl was also killed near the scene. Her mother remains in critical condition, as well as a photographer who was also covering the tragedy.
Our hearts go out to Pine Hills as they mourn the loss of their community members whose lives were stolen far too soon. But thoughts and prayers are not enough. I am angry, and we must do something.
This is a horrible tragedy that could’ve been prevented with commonsense gun safety solutions. But right now, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and extreme members of the state legislature are pushing for dangerous permitless carry legislation that would strip away licensing and training requirements and encourage more firearms to flood our Florida communities, no questions asked.
When do we say enough is enough?
Everyone should feel safe to do their jobs without the fear of getting shot. Gun violence is the leading cause of death for children in America. _Nine-year-olds_ are dying because some of our elected officials choose to prioritize the gun lobby’s wishlist over community safety.
Is this the nation we want to be?
I won’t rest until we see a future free from gun violence in Florida and in every state in our nation.
Please keep standing with me in this fight.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords

* * *

**Giffords PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to Giffords PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb23.wLJBGg&refcode=em230223-1-15&t=1&akid=4300%2E3935704%2EmUE8sy)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=4300%2E3935704%2EmUE8sy) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: VADEMS
subject: GOP Del. Byron: “Abortion is not healthcare”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We need to beat this GOP extremism

|
---
Derek, On the floor of the House of Delegates, **Del. Kathy Byron said “Abortion is not healthcare. To believe that abortion is healthcare, you must believe that pregnancy is a disease”.** This is today’s Virginia GOP. They’re a party that Virginia cannot afford to have in power. A Republican trifecta is a possibility if Democrats don’t build another Blue Wave in 2023. That would be devastating for our Commonwealth and the people of Virginia. The Virginia GOP has already tried to ban abortion multiple times in this year’s General Assembly Session — and they would’ve succeeded if it weren’t for the Democrats in the Virginia Senate. Delegate Byron isn’t an outlier in her party, Derek, she just said the quiet part out loud. **Electing Democrats this year, Democrats that will defend the right to choose, that believe that abortion care IS healthcare, and that will block the VA GOP and governor Youngkin’s attempts to strip our rights away, will be the most important thing we do this year.** **[Will you chip in to support Democrats who will defend the right to choose?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159005/393385826/-1927976296?refcode=dpva-em-230223-byron&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTEyMWExZC1iZmIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nE46YlYES16LbIWnUbRENsJ4FYiHqlHlhjdyX69NUHk=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We need to beat this GOP extremism | Derek, On the floor of the House of Delegates, Del. Kathy Byron said “Abortion is not healthcare. To believe that abortion is healthcare, you must believe that pregnancy is a disease”. This is today’s Virginia GOP. They’re a party that Virginia cannot afford to have in power. A Republican trifecta is a possibility if Democrats don’t build another Blue Wave in 2023. That would be devastating for our Commonwealth and the people of Virginia. The Virginia GOP has already tried to ban abortion multiple times in this year’s General Assembly Session — and they would’ve succeeded if it weren’t for the Democrats in the Virginia Senate. Delegate Byron isn’t an outlier in her party, Derek, she just said the quiet part out loud. Electing Democrats this year, Democrats that will defend the right to choose, that believe that abortion care IS healthcare, and that will block the VA GOP and governor Youngkin’s attempts to strip our rights away, will be the most important thing we do this year. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** | ******=****** ---|--- ******=****** | ******=****** ******=****** | ******=****** The new districts that we’re running on are going to make it tough for us to win majorities in the House and Senate, but we MUST WIN THE MAJORITY.** That is why I’m reaching out today — we can’t let people who don’t even believe that getting an abortion is healthcare be in a position to impose their beliefs on the people of Virginia. We’re gearing up for a fight this cycle. ’s so much at stake here this year. body:
This election could determine the fate of Wisconsin's decades-old abortion ban law. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159656/393387862/1529762909?emci=9fc913d0-21ff-ec11-b47a-281878b83d8a&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=%7B%7BContactsEmailID%7D%7D&refcode=em_230224_splitcopy&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWEzOWMzOC1jMWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dy6N8hxPy6WoGSopk39W9-XM5CWuN8rVRBVN1nEN5xk=) | Friends, There is NOWHERE else in the country with a race so critical to reproductive rights than right here in Wisconsin. Already, the press is emphasizing the race for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, giving it national attention. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159658/393387864/761117104?amount=25&refcode=em_230224_splitcopy&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWEzOWMzOC1jMWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dy6N8hxPy6WoGSopk39W9-XM5CWuN8rVRBVN1nEN5xk=)** | [DONATE TO ELECT A LIBERAL JUDGE!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159660/393387866/102391326?amount=25&refcode=em_230224_splitcopy&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWEzOWMzOC1jMWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dy6N8hxPy6WoGSopk39W9-XM5CWuN8rVRBVN1nEN5xk=)
---
Janet Protasiewicz is a liberal judge running to determine the balance of power between conservative and liberal justices for the next two years in Wisconsin. This election could determine the fate of Wisconsin's decades-old abortion ban law.
[**There are just six weeks until Election Day, and I’m doing my part to help secure reproductive rights and more across Wisconsin. That’s why I’m asking my supporters to make a split donation between my re-election campaign, Judge Janet, and Jodi Sinykin to support these critical races on April 4th! Can you help us reach our $2,000 goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159662/393387868/102391326?amount=25&refcode=em_230224_splitcopy&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWEzOWMzOC1jMWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dy6N8hxPy6WoGSopk39W9-XM5CWuN8rVRBVN1nEN5xk=)
Right now, Republicans hold a 21-11 advantage over Democrats in the Wisconsin State Senate. But we have a chance to break their filibuster-proof majority by electing Jodi Sinykin on April 4!
As a State Senator, I know how often the work Democrats are trying to do to fight for working families is undermined by the Republican supermajority. With your help, we can support Jodi and break the GOP’s filibuster-proof majority so we can bring them to the table on the issues that matter most to us.
[**With not just one but TWO critical elections coming up on April 4th, there’s no time to waste. Split a donation between all three of our campaigns and we can flip Wisconsin blue once and for all!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159664/393387870/102391326?amount=25&refcode=em_230224_splitcopy&sourceid=1008588&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWEzOWMzOC1jMWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dy6N8hxPy6WoGSopk39W9-XM5CWuN8rVRBVN1nEN5xk=)
– Brad
* * *
Brad Pfaff represents Wisconsin State Senate District 32. As a proud son of the rolling hills, coulees, and valleys of northern La Crosse County where he was raised on his family's dairy farm, he's dedicated to finding commonsense solutions for our community's challenges. We can move Wisconsin forward, together. Thank you for being on our team, we really appreciate you, team! Already, the press is emphasizing the race for Wisconsin’s Supreme Court, giving it national attention. = | = Janet Protasiewicz is a liberal judge running to determine the balance of power between conservative and liberal justices for the next two years in Wisconsin. This election could determine the fate of Wisconsin's decades-old abortion ban law. = Right now, Republicans hold a 21-11 advantage over Democrats in the Wisconsin State Senate. But we have a chance to break their filibuster-proof majority by electing Jodi Sinykin on April 4! As a State Senator, I know how often the work Democrats are trying to do to fight for working families is undermined by the Republican supermajority. With your help, we can support Jodi and break the GOP’s filibuster-proof majority so we can bring them to the table on the issues that matter most to us. = – Brad * Brad Pfaff represents Wisconsin State Senate District 32. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: they doubted we could win, and now we're in debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
In the final days of the 2022 election, pundits were seriously doubting whether we could pull off a win in the Granite State.
| | |
---
_Hi – GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. In order to win, my (victorious!) campaign took on a bit of debt and now we have a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.**[Before I go on, will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59138336/393337163/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2211-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzUwNTlkZi05N2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=raqf58eqzVTgAIsndEZoEjCVQ0Zn9WmeR9rbfcOeewg=)**_
|
---
Look – in the final days of the 2022 election, pundits were seriously doubting whether we could pull off a win in the Granite State.

GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED. Polls tightened to within a point or two. Outside spending was through the roof.

My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to win. We were making quick decisions with the information we had, hoping that the additional funding we needed would come through.

Despite our best efforts, the necessary funding _didn’t_ come through and now my campaign has some debt to make up to pay the last of our bills. We made a pretty good dent in it the last few weeks, but we’ve still got a little more to go. Since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to help:

**[Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. In order to win, my (victorious!) campaign took on a bit of debt and now we have a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.= | Look – in the final days of the 2022 election, pundits were seriously doubting whether we could pull off a win in the Granite State. GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED. Polls tightened to within a point or two. Outside spending was through the roof. My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to win. We were making quick decisions with the information we had, hoping that the additional funding we needed would come through. Despite our best efforts, the necessary funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has some debt to make up to pay the last of our bills. We made a pretty good dent in it the last few weeks, but we’ve still got a little more to go. Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.

We need accountability for Trump and everyone else involved in the attempt to overturn the 2020 election and instigate the insurrection on January 6th. And hearing from Jared and Ivanka on what happened inside the White House that day is an important step in that direction.

But MAGA Republicans are already planning their counterattack. They want to flout the rule of law, sweep this investigation under the rug and install election deniers in public office so that the next time they decide to overturn an election, they succeed.

The more we let Trump, MAGA Republicans and his supporters off the hook for their dangerous conspiracy theories and attempts at authoritarianism, the more at risk our democracy and our freedom are.

That’s why Eric is fighting tooth and nail to fight back against the MAGA-right and pave the way for a Democratic House majority in 2023. Chip in today to help us build the momentum we need to take back Congress, hold MAGA Republicans accountable and fight back against their fascist agenda. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Shontel has always been a fierce advocate for Black Ohioans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159923/393388920/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230223BlackFighters_N_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTJkNmU1MS1jM2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DH1slnPrOy5upWgvZzvsORYYeAdpObKbSqzBShshGF8=) Peter,

Black History Month is an opportunity to honor and celebrate the achievements and contributions of Black Americans who have pushed our country forward. This year, we have the chance to uplift and support our very own groundbreaking voice for Black lives, Rep. Shontel Brown.

Shontel has always been a fierce advocate for Black Ohioans. **As a Cuyahoga County Councilmember, she crafted and passed a bipartisan bill declaring racism a public health crisis.** She made history as the first woman and first Black person to lead the state's largest Democratic party, the Cuyahoga County Democrats. And now, she’s fighting for Black lives in Congress every day.

**Shontel’s work has always focused on securing healthcare, jobs, and justice for Ohio's Black community and our most disenfranchised community members.** But to keep her fighting in Congress and ensure her team has the resources to uplift Black voices in OH-11 and beyond, she needs your support.

[**_This Black History Month, join Shontel in the fight. Chipping in just $5 today will help keep her team on the ground and ensure Black voices are heard in Ohio and across the country. clean_body: Shontel has always been a fierce advocate for Black Ohioans. = Peter, Black History Month is an opportunity to honor and celebrate the achievements and contributions of Black Americans who have pushed our country forward. This year, we have the chance to uplift and support our very own groundbreaking voice for Black lives, Rep. Shontel Brown. Shontel has always been a fierce advocate for Black Ohioans. As a Cuyahoga County Councilmember, she crafted and passed a bipartisan bill declaring racism a public health crisis. She made history as the first woman and first Black person to lead the state's largest Democratic party, the Cuyahoga County Democrats. And now, she’s fighting for Black lives in Congress every day. Shontel’s work has always focused on securing healthcare, jobs, and justice for Ohio's Black community and our most disenfranchised community members. But to keep her fighting in Congress and ensure her team has the resources to uplift Black voices in OH-11 and beyond, she needs your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = With solidarity, Team Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. Will you join her and be the change we need? = Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress Shontel Brown for Congress PO Box 221232 Beachwood, OH 44122 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our country. But our work is far from over, and Democrats are counting on this grassroots team to continue building the strongest party in history. | | We’ve come so far together, Derek. We’ve created millions of new jobs, expanded access to affordable health care, made historic investments in climate, infrastructure, and veterans benefits, and signed the most significant gun legislation in three decades. I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our country. But our work is far from over. Kamala and I are counting on this grassroots team to continue building the strongest Democratic Party in history. The DNC is the only party organization tasked with winning elections for Democrats at every level -- in state legislatures, governor’s offices, Congress, and more. Last year they ran innovative organizing, data, tech, and voter protection programs to secure our Senate majority, flip gubernatorial seats in Arizona, Maryland, and Massachusetts, and win state legislative chambers in Michigan, Minnesota, and Pennsylvania. But running those programs well required early investment, Derek. Thank you for everything you do, Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Congressman Colin Allred is a rising star in Democratic politics. He's a former NFL linebacker, the child of a single mother, and was born and raised in Texas. In 2018, he beat an incumbent Republican to win his North Texas seat.
Sounds to us like someone who could beat Ted Cruz.
With this announcement, you can bet Cruz's fundraising has gone into overdrive. We need to be prepared to support Congressman Allred or anyone else who steps up to the plate to take on Cruz. Even members of the Chinese Communist Party.

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z85ogub2994cpf6ss2878fveuh8o8bf8erhmfqvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr7chie0pb4cdh2bs)

Friend,

Senate Democrats want NON-CITIZENS - including foreign nationals and even members of the Chinese Communist Party - to vote in our elections.

_The House just passed a bipartisan resolution to REPEAL Washington DC 's new law that allows ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS and FOREIGNERS in the city to vote._

_**But Senate Democrats are working behind the scenes with the Biden-Harris Administration to kill this common-sense legislation and stop it from coming to the Senate floor.**_

If we don't take back control of the Senate and stop these radicals from handing control of our elections to illegal immigrants and foreigners, there will not be an America left to save.

body:
Help Senate Republicans craft our winning strategy.

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08508%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=h6PcNqgouBbTwixioPNrrg&sysid=1)

Friend, it’s Senator Ron Johnson. I need you to do me a small favor.

You’ve done a lot to fight for Republicans over the years. In fact, our records indicate that you’re one of the most active grassroots conservatives in your community.
**That’s why I’ve selected YOU to represent YOUR AREA in the 2023 NRSC Nationwide Census.**
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08509%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cBLIDJ2f1pzWQ4QIfdBCYA&sysid=1)

[TAKE THE CENSUS >>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08500%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z59FXiVVefeb9jqA9Bg2SQ&sysid=1)

It’s extremely important for you to complete your brief survey as soon as possible.

_Your responses will represent your entire area, and it will provide my colleagues and I with the critical information we need to build a winning strategy for 2024._

Friend, out of the thousands of conservatives in your area, I chose you because of your relentless support in our fight against the radical Left.

I trust I made the right decision, and I hope you won’t let me down.

**[So please, take the 2023 NRSC Nationwide Census RIGHT NOW to give us vital input as we craft our strategy to win back the Senate.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08501%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7LR38ydIx5FPJD2CIT%2fRNg&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c08502%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XLymp8Bmz582HizB9XhZiQ&sysid=1)

We’re only two months into 2023, and I want to tell you about some of the good work we’ve already accomplished with our new Democratic trifecta:
* I signed a $1 billion supplemental budget to improve access to affordable housing & more
* We passed the largest tax cut in decades
* Michigan became one of the first states in the presidential primary process

Democrats came together to support these smart and common-sense solutions to problems facing Michiganders, and we’re not done yet. But this good work didn’t come easy though. **We have slim majorities in both the state House and Senate, and I’m working to help protect and expand them in the years ahead.**

**[We have to keep up this good work. That’s why I’m asking you to donate $5 today to Building Bridges – my PAC that is focused on electing more Democrats up and down the ballot here in body:

| | | To be honest, Peter, I don't like saying this.

But it's no secret that it has to be said before too long.

So I'm going to ask you a very important question.

**_[Please read my question and answer HERE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62357906:JFZZi7GN5:m:1:3331421248:2F80BB7661788D0BA94D6E9E874D8578:r "Please read my question and answer HERE.")_**

Thank you for your understanding,

Ron Johnson

Thanks to you I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had, and more. I took on some campaign debt, and now it's time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, but **_[will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62357906:JFZZi7GN5:m:1:3331421248:2F80BB7661788D0BA94D6E9E874D8578:r "will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end")_** so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?

Ron Johnson

subject: Extremists are resorting to violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
Extremists across the state are willing to do ANYTHING in order to implement their hateful agenda

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dg8rimjmT_HKXnyYU6ggD0KPqZVmXBg3xDPZ33p8lDA=/YM20d-Fih7K-n2AomlGEIVNykxO8X793rRG8OiazRWg=?refcode=EM_FR_230223Threats_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_A_Logo)
Fellow Democrats, today, we're writing to you about a concerning development in local Illinois politics.

Extremist groups here in Illinois have taken their hateful rhetoric to a dangerous new level, ramping up their campaign of intimidation and violent threats against _**school and library board members and candidates**_. What we saw on January 6, 2021 was just a rehearsal for some of these individuals.

It is unacceptable for anyone to resort to violence, intimidation, or harassment in order to push their political agenda, especially against those who are working to improve our education system and promote literacy.

These threats don't just put these individuals at risk -- they threaten the very foundation of our democracy.

**It 's up to all of us to stand up to their dangerous ideologies and ensure our communities remain safe and inclusive for everyone. It is only through collaboration and respect for all Illinoisans that we can build a better future for ourselves and future generations. ****[Will you donate $10 right away to back up our efforts to keep dangerous extremists out of office?](https://act.myngp.com/el/dg8rimjmT_HKXnyYU6ggD0KPqZVmXBg3xDPZ33p8lDA=/YM20d-Fih7K-n2AomlGEIVNykxO8X793rRG8OiazRWg=?refcode=EM_FR_230223Threats_TEAM_90DO_4_NG_A_L1&amount=10)**

name: Sen. Shevrin Jones
subject: DeSantis is trying to erase Black history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe
body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59142530/393351958/390144955?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230223_1_1&refcode2=70595eca-a1b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=jjOlqRjfY3VefZmlsCvgYwF9bds0P4xPnFi4iefRv5Xe3fCS/VSQ0kWifdRZ/qibcrSd/PxWXP8OpaSKJZYxbA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNTk1ZWNhLWExYjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=34R-03cj3u0a0O0d8fKdF9mSZb98JajmerR7T_oNKL4=)
---
Hi there Peter,

I’m Senator Shevrin Jones. I represent Florida’s 34th District in the State Senate – and I’m the first openly LGBTQ Black person elected to the Florida Legislature.

Right now, Americans across the country are celebrating Black History Month by lifting up Black voices and honoring those who came before us.

**But here in Florida, Governor Ron DeSantis and Republican legislators are working overtime to erase Black history and ban students from learning the truth.**

[Ron DeSantis has waged a war on education and relentlessly attacked efforts to teach Black history. Will you sign the Democrats Serve petition condemning DeSantis’ shameful policies?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59142538/393351962/869264783?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230223_1_1&refcode2=70595eca-a1b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=jjOlqRjfY3VefZmlsCvgYwF9bds0P4xPnFi4iefRv5Xe3fCS/VSQ0kWifdRZ/qibcrSd/PxWXP8OpaSKJZYxbA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNTk1ZWNhLWExYjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=34R-03cj3u0a0O0d8fKdF9mSZb98JajmerR7T_oNKL4=&emci=e8663b06-f8b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=70595eca-a1b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)
| | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59142541/393351970/869264783?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230223_1_1&refcode2=70595eca-a1b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=jjOlqRjfY3VefZmlsCvgYwF9bds0P4xPnFi4iefRv5Xe3fCS/VSQ0kWifdRZ/qibcrSd/PxWXP8OpaSKJZYxbA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNTk1ZWNhLWExYjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=34R-03cj3u0a0O0d8fKdF9mSZb98JajmerR7T_oNKL4=&emci=e8663b06-f8b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=70595eca-a1b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)
---

Last year, DeSantis championed the “Stop WOKE Act,” effectively banning any efforts to teach the truth about systemic racism and racial injustices. And just last month, DeSantis rejected the new AP African American History course, saying it lacked “educational value.”

__They’re trying to ban the truth – and we can’t let them.__ Our schools should be teaching about _all_ of our history. Anything less is a disservice to each and every student in our state.

**Peter, will you sign the Democrats Serve petition condemning Ron DeSantis’ efforts to erase Black history and demanding Florida students learn the truth about our history?**

[https://takeaction.democratsserve.org/a/desantis](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59142545/393351973/869264783?source=DS_EM_PT_90DO_230223_1_1&refcode2=70595eca-a1b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=jjOlqRjfY3VefZmlsCvgYwF9bds0P4xPnFi4iefRv5Xe3fCS/VSQ0kWifdRZ/qibcrSd/PxWXP8OpaSKJZYxbA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwNzg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcwNTk1ZWNhLWExYjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=34R-03cj3u0a0O0d8fKdF9mSZb98JajmerR7T_oNKL4=&emci=e8663b06-f8b2-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=70595eca-a1b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=10067282)

clean_body: | = Hi there Peter, I’m Senator Shevrin Jones. I represent Florida’s 34th District in the State Senate – and I’m the first openly LGBTQ Black person elected to the Florida Legislature. Right now, Americans across the country are celebrating Black History Month by lifting up Black voices and honoring those who came before us. But here in Florida, Governor Ron DeSantis and Republican legislators are working overtime to erase Black history and ban students from learning the truth. | | Last year, DeSantis championed the “Stop WOKE Act,” effectively banning any efforts to teach the truth about systemic racism and racial injustices. And just last month, DeSantis rejected the new AP African American History course, saying it lacked “educational value.” They’re trying to ban the truth – and we can’t let them. Our schools should be teaching about all of our history. Anything less is a disservice to each and every student in our state. Peter, will you sign the Democrats Serve petition condemning Ron DeSantis’ efforts to erase Black history and demanding Florida students learn the truth about our history? Thanks for signing on, Senator Shevrin Jones | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Democrats Serve, DemocratsServe.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | =

clean_body: It’s not just federal races we have to care about... | | | Hi Peter — In case you didn’t know, state races are fast approaching across the country. These races, especially those for governor, have the power to impact policies across economic, social, civil rights, health, and other critical issue areas. In the past year alone, we’ve seen GOP governors wreak havoc on their states safety, democracy, and citizen protections. We’ve seen Republican governors make the wrong choice time and again on issues like gun control, voter protections, abortion rights, and public health. Many of these governors, like Ron DeSantis, Kristi Noem, and Glenn Youngkin, have even floated a campaign for president in 2024. The good news is that we have the power to help states and voters make the right choice — and vote Democrat. And we are. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: Thank you for supporting Democrats in state capitals across the country. – United Rural Democrats HQ United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

clean_body: | | | | | ❗❗❗ATTENTION, FRIEND❗❗❗ We were hoping the bombardment of blatantly false ads trying to defame Tom Kean would come to an end, at least for a little bit after the election... ...but we were wrong. We had to check our calendars to make sure it wasn’t already 2024, because just days ago, a Democrat Super PAC launched an ad campaign against Tom. Does the ad mention how Tom votes in Congress? Does the ad mention Tom’s positions on the issues? Does the ad even mention something Tom has said? Why? Because the Democrats have absolutely nothing to attack Tom on. Instead of having any sort of grounding in the truth, the ad is entirely made up and tries to paint Tom as someone he’s not. If Democrat dark-money groups are pouring money into our race before they’ve even selected their candidate, we can only imagine how much more they’ll be spending as the election gets closer. Friend, help us push back on these Democrat lies about Tom and get ready to confront whatever else they may try to throw at us. Better yet, we can make this ad backfire on them. While they try to use dark money to hurt Tom, Thank you, Kean HQ | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , , and . name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Jon Tester easily connects issues we all care about--climate, USPS, infrastructure & more--to a life of hard work, in his case on the farm, better than anyone else. He’d be a good Senator from any state. In a state with a 20-point Republican advantage, he’s a rare gift. Let’s send him back to the Senate.
body:
He’s in!!!

| | | | | Peter, [**It's official, he's in!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T804e4a26-fb8e-41dd-9741-9b999d5c2952/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The "he" is Jon Tester, and it's incredible news because it's such a key race for us to hold our majority. But also because of the kind of person Jon Tester is._ _**Tester shocked the political world in 2006, knocking off an incumbent GOP Senator. He did this because he is, and always has been, the real deal.** _ **From Tester himself:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T700efe13-7a56-4b2f-b9c0-0dffea4c2198/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Tester easily connects issues we all care about--climate, USPS, infrastructure & more--to a life of hard work, in his case on the farm, better than anyone else._** [**_Will you please join us in supporting Jon Tester, from "On The Farm with Sharla & Jon," by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, to hold a crucial Senate seat, remain in the Senate majority and keep this incredible Senator in DC?!?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb16b4726-2af3-48b2-8c46-38d1d244c2bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_He's always there for Democratic priority legislation, because he knows it benefits _his_ _people_. Never feels a need to position himself vs our party for some narcissistic need for attention, or fear he appears too "liberal," like Sinema & Manchin. Again, because, _he's the real deal-_ -he's "Yellowstone," no performance required_**

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf5d8e34-29db-4119-a1bd-c175e3a4ceb2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Sherrod Brown is up for re-election in 2024, and as one of just three Democrats in states that were won by President Trump, he’s one of the GOP’s top targets.

In fact, Sherrod already has a wealthy Republican opponent and the National Republican Senatorial Committee is already running attack ads against him.

NBC reports that Sherrod's race could be even nastier and more expensive than last year's Senate race in Ohio, which was one of the most expensive in the country, with over $200 million spent.

It's going to be his toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can help Sherrod win in Ohio. body:

---
**BREAKING NEWS: "America First Legal & Texas File For An Emergency Injunction To Block Biden's Most Extreme Open Borders Decree..."**
Patriot, Did you see the headline above recently? **The situation is dire.** The far-left is cheering as DHS attempts to roll out Biden's most insidious and radical open borders edict to date:**a parole program for illegal aliens**. **This lawless action is a threat to American sovereignty. ** That's why _America First Legal is taking action_ to stop it. We're proud to work with the courageous Ken Paxton to represent Texas and a coalition of twenty states as we seek an **emergency preliminary injunction** to shut down this pernicious program, and prevent it from injecting a new wave of illegal aliens into America. [**Support America First Legal Here >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62355718:6ESJW7GNj:m:1:3391001263:8DF4373541D8B98E198415BFAE85BFF2:r) The unlawful program allows illegal aliens to obtain advance approval to enter the United States - despite no basis in the law for them doing so. And the preliminary injunction we just filed for _**will stop this program cold while we fight it in court!**_ Biden's staggeringly RADICAL plan to **mass import illegal aliens** directly to the United States without any legal basis for doing so is nothing more than a brazen attempt to accelerate stratospheric migration levels while concealing its sheer volume by transporting illegal aliens directly into the American interior. If we don't stop Biden's program the damage will be catastrophic: **a deluge of illegal migrants flooding our labor markets, burdening taxpayers, jeopardizing public health and safety, and stretching our safety net to the breaking point. ** [_To win our fight to_** _stop this traitorous campaign_** _to transform our country with mass illegal immigration we need your help. Please support our efforts right now with a generous donation,_**_thank you! >> _**_ _](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62355718:6ESJW7GNj:m:1:3391001263:8DF4373541D8B98E198415BFAE85BFF2:r) _Thank you for your crucial support as we fight this lawless scheme!_ Stephen Miller President, America First Legal

name: Alice Moye-Honeyman
subject: Here’s what AOC’s Homework Helpers program has been able to accomplish
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
AOC’s Homework Helpers program has been a resounding success, thanks to you.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230223-3927-header&t=1&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)
This is Alice, an organizer for Team AOC’s Homework Helpers program. As you may remember, Homework Helpers started when the COVID-19 pandemic forced New York City schools to shut down and students transitioned to online learning.
After hearing from families who were struggling to juggle work, childcare, and technology, Alexandria had an idea to do something pretty radical for a congressional campaign (as most others were laser focused on just getting elected): **she started this free tutoring program to connect volunteers from across the country with students from our community** who could use help with their homework, **and two years later the program is still going strong**.
We’ve been crunching the numbers from our parent/guardian feedback surveys and can confirm that the program has been a resounding success.
Here are some highlights:
* We’ve conducted 6,000+ one-on-one Homework Helper sessions
* Parents and guardians expressed a decrease in concern about their children in the following areas: emotional well-being, fear of falling behind in school, and readiness for the school year
* We served families who spoke the following languages at home: Albanian, Arabic, Bengali, Cantonese, English, Mandarin, Spanish, and Tibetan
* Parents and guardians expressed improvement in their children’s excitement and confidence for learning
* We’ve heard directly from families about the impact of Homework Helpers on their child’s well-being. A parent recently told us: “I am so happy my daughter has a tutor to help her. This is also great for my daughter’s mental health. She feels like her tutor is someone she can talk to about school. Our students need that.”

Because of volunteers with our program and the support from small-dollar donors, this program has had a tremendous positive impact in our community.
**So what’s next from here?** Homework Helpers has started to expand into other parts of New York State — Team AOC worked with [student organizers at University of Buffalo](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16859?t=2&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61) to help them open their own Homework Helpers chapter this past fall. Additionally, we’re focusing our efforts in 2023 on matching bilingual volunteers with migrant students who’ve just arrived in New York City in order to provide them and their families with academic and social-emotional support.
Up until this point, we’ve been able to fund our Homework Helpers program thanks to your generous support. **Now, here’s what I need from you: if you can afford it, I am asking you to make a contribution today so we can expand our program and purchase classroom materials, fund field trips, and create ESOL (English to Speakers of Other Languages) training materials for volunteers.**
[**https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/homework-helpers**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230223.gXDVt0&refcode=em20230223-3927-P_FND_EGR_HWH&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)
We’ve decided to expand Homework Helpers because this mutual aid program is at the core of what this movement is about: helping people. Our campaign isn’t just active when it’s a voting year. We use your contributions to help keep these programs available for our communities year-round.
None of this would be possible if it weren’t for the community organizers who put this together and everyday people who stepped up to volunteer a few hours to tutor a student or chip in to our campaign or shop. So many kids have seen leaps in their grades thanks to you and your support. Let’s keep this going. **If you can be part of this work by contributing and helping to expand this special program, here’s that link one more time:**
[https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/homework-helpers](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230223.gXDVt0&refcode=em20230223-3927-P_FND_EGR_HWH&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)
I’m so thankful for the people reading this email, the people who make up this movement who are so full of heart and generosity. We’re doing something great together.
Thank you again, and thank you for reading,
Alice Moye-Honeyman
Political Organizer
Team AOC
P.S. We’re currently working to match Spanish-speaking volunteers with students who are asylum seekers in NYC. This school year, NYC schools have enrolled more than 11,000+ new migrant students, many of whom are having difficulty with significant language barriers. If you aren’t proficient in Spanish, we could still use your help virtually from anywhere in the country – [**join one of our upcoming info sessions here to learn more!**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/16860?source=em20230223-3927&utm_source=em20230223-3927&t=5&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230223?refcode=em20230223-3927-P_FND_EGR_HWH&t=6&refcode2=3927_2526796_HT5d61&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230223-3927-P_FND_EGR_HWH&t=7&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=8&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=9&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=10&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=3927%2E2526796%2EHT5d61)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Bonnie Watson Coleman
subject: What February means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59145139/393361129/1328194270?refcode=EM_NBI_BWC_20230223_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_BlackHistoryMonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTI4ZjljMS1hN2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaLzQUJxdYO528FiakLYGi9C2hbTjezZLRbpdCpyKhk=&emci=5382c0bb-a7b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7528f9c1-a7b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) | As you know, February marks Black History Month — a time set aside to reflect on the history of Black people, both our triumphs and our struggles.

In observing Black History Month, I introduced the Black History Matters Act. This legislation would direct the National Museum of African American History and Culture (NMAAHC) to conduct a study on Black history education efforts in public elementary and secondary schools.

A recent study has shown that only 8-9% of history class time is devoted to Black history and some states even neglect the subject altogether. The Black History Matters Act will allow students to understand our history at a deeper level.

Knowing and embracing our history is a pivotal step we must take to move forward. [If you agree with me, sign your name today to urge my colleagues to pass the Black History Matters Act.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59145140/393361130/-745613395?refcode=EM_NBI_BWC_20230223_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_BlackHistoryMonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTI4ZjljMS1hN2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaLzQUJxdYO528FiakLYGi9C2hbTjezZLRbpdCpyKhk=&emci=5382c0bb-a7b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7528f9c1-a7b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59145141/393361131/-745613395?refcode=EM_NBI_BWC_20230223_PT_NA_0_3MO_Bonnie_NA_NA_BlackHistoryMonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTI4ZjljMS1hN2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yaLzQUJxdYO528FiakLYGi9C2hbTjezZLRbpdCpyKhk=&emci=5382c0bb-a7b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=7528f9c1-a7b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=30096098) As you know, I am the first African-American woman to represent New Jersey in Congress, co-founder and co-chair of the Congressional Caucus on Black Women and Girls, and a member of the Congressional Black Caucus. I will continue to reflect the rich history of our country and I ask you to join me by signing your name today.

Thank you,

Bonnie Watson Coleman

---

Bonnie Watson Coleman represents New Jersey's 12th district in Congress. She is a strong fighter for progressive values and has dedicated herself to the service of her community.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jen=20Kiggans?=
subject: Fighting for Women’s Sports
body:
Our daughters should be protected | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=02993ba1db&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=cc09009506&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Dear Peter,
A few weeks ago, I had the honor of participating in a panel hosted by Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy with some incredible female student athletes. We discussed the challenges and obstacles that female athletes face when organizations like the NCAA allow biological men to compete against them.
As a mother of two daughters who have worked hard to be champions in their respective sports, I personally understand the significance of this issue. **My daughters, along with countless other girls across the country, deserve to be recognized for their hard work, determination, and passion for their chosen sports.** The competition should not be taken from right underneath them. My commitment to advocacy and support for women and women's sports has never been stronger.
I want to make a pledge to the people of Virginia’s Second Congressional District and this country: Our daughters will continue to receive the respect and athletic recognition they deserve.
This is not only a personal issue for me, but also a matter of justice and fairness. I am determined to make sure that these female athletes are given the credit they are due.
---
| [Support Our Daughters by Supporting Jen Kiggans >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=ec41a5be18&e=4955722b3e "Support Our Daughters by Supporting Jen Kiggans >>>")
---
| With Gratitude,
Jen Kiggans

name: Team Cori
subject: Challenging, no?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Deadline update:
#
Here’s the situation.
**Challenge #1:** In the months following an election, we see a natural fundraising slump. We get it, a 24-hour news cycle full of nail-biting races is exhausting. Driving progress is a marathon, and sometimes we just need a break.
**Challenge #2:** February is a shorter month, so even if our daily fundraising average stays the same — we still come up short.
**Goal:** Meet our February fundraising goal to cover operating costs of the campaign and — importantly, continue leading by example with a strong, people-powered, grassroots campaign and will never accept a dime from those corporate PACs.
Taeka from our Finance Team reached out earlier this week. Since she shared that we weren’t on track to hit our monthly budget goal by February 28 — people sprang into action and we’re in sight of our February goal.
**[Can you rush a donation today to help us make up for this short month and keep our movement on track?](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230223.thWXcb&refcode=em20230223-2227&t=1&akid=2227%2E1082990%2EtZVsPC)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230223.thWXcb&amount=5&refcode=em20230223-2227&t=20&akid=2227%2E1082990%2EtZVsPC)**
Thanks for your continued support,
Team Cori

name: Tina Kotek
subject: Improving access to mental health and addiction services
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, One of my top priorities as Governor is to make sure that when an Oregonian is ready to seek help for a mental health concern or substance use, that help is easy to find and available — no matter where they live or what they can afford. That was my message when I visited Douglas County last week as part of my One Oregon Listening Tour. I met with teachers, local leaders who are helping address homelessness, and mental health providers. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59146785/393363640/-1414745000?contactdata=79sPWCnldNr2OWSyq+S4Gjj1aVsszrNixpT076JIBqjkzOEIbwZwlTclbjYNas3csndu7PKOBQ4xvOd2S3k9MGFUTwQHh9zGqgT8cF12pq3ApHPvffRLPXHOGi0pet7G276ajhYe21Eo4UuK81+9ka0DX25N61uHKHwNPCeH+Qg=&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjNiNWFlOS1hYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5m_ZflxcaG_1cJgRpBx8T_4YR8T5O5PyAUElsx8TzE=&emci=d68d951a-02b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bb3b5ae9-aab3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15353729) One of the pillars of my mission-focused budget recommendation is improving access to mental health and addiction services. These are important investments that will disrupt the harmful and expensive homelessness-jail-hospital pipeline, save lives by funding crisis prevention systems and addiction treatment services, and support Oregon’s essential behavioral health workers. But passing a mission-focused budget through the Oregon State Legislature and making big improvements to our mental health system will take a lot of work, and I need your help. **I’m focused on ensuring Oregonians see action — real action — that makes a difference in their everyday lives. If you agree, please add your name to this petition supporting my budget priorities, including investments in a mental health and addiction treatment system that will lead to hope, healing and recovery.** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59146786/393363641/-1414745000?contactdata=79sPWCnldNr2OWSyq+S4Gjj1aVsszrNixpT076JIBqjkzOEIbwZwlTclbjYNas3csndu7PKOBQ4xvOd2S3k9MGFUTwQHh9zGqgT8cF12pq3ApHPvffRLPXHOGi0pet7G276ajhYe21Eo4UuK81+9ka0DX25N61uHKHwNPCeH+Qg=&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjNiNWFlOS1hYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5m_ZflxcaG_1cJgRpBx8T_4YR8T5O5PyAUElsx8TzE=&emci=d68d951a-02b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bb3b5ae9-aab3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15353729)
---
No matter who you are, where you live, or what you can pay, you are not alone.
Mental health challenges and substance abuse are struggles that too many Oregonians, their families, and their communities have faced alone. As your Governor, I promise that we will not leave you behind.
Thank you for having my back,
Tina
Tina for Oregon
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242 **[tinafororegon.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59146787/393363642/1133357015?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjNiNWFlOS1hYWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I5m_ZflxcaG_1cJgRpBx8T_4YR8T5O5PyAUElsx8TzE=&emci=d68d951a-02b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bb3b5ae9-aab3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15353729) | [info@tinafororegon.com](mailto:info@tinafororegon.com)** | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

clean_body: | Peter, One of my top priorities as Governor is to make sure that when an Oregonian is ready to seek help for a mental health concern or substance use, that help is easy to find and available — no matter where they live or what they can afford. That was my message when I visited Douglas County last week as part of my One Oregon Listening Tour. I met with teachers, local leaders who are helping address homelessness, and mental health providers. One of the pillars of my mission-focused budget recommendation is improving access to mental health and addiction services. These are important investments that will disrupt the harmful and expensive homelessness-jail-hospital pipeline, save lives by funding crisis prevention systems and addiction treatment services, and support Oregon’s essential behavioral health workers. But passing a mission-focused budget through the Oregon State Legislature and making big improvements to our mental health system will take a lot of work, and I need your help. I’m focused on ensuring Oregonians see action — real action — that makes a difference in their everyday lives. If you agree, please add your name to this petition supporting my budget priorities, including investments in a mental health and addiction treatment system that will lead to hope, healing and recovery. | No matter who you are, where you live, or what you can pay, you are not alone. Mental health challenges and substance abuse are struggles that too many Oregonians, their families, and their communities have faced alone. As your Governor, I promise that we will not leave you behind. Thank you for having my back, Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jon=20Tester?=
subject: I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me
body:
*Sent in support of Jon Tester and Lucas Kunce*

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amounts={{ amounts }}

Peter, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana.

I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet.

If you’re with me, please split a donation between Lucas Kunce and my campaign right now to become a Founding Donor. If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start. (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amounts={{ amounts }})

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
Contribute $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{10}})
Contribute $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{25}})
Contribute $30 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{30}})
Contribute $50 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{50}})
Contribute $100 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{100}})
Contribute $250 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{250}})
Give another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amounts={{ amounts }})

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.

I can’t do it without your support. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me? (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amounts={{ amounts }})

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
Contribute $10 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{10}})
Contribute $25 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{25}})
Contribute $30 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{30}})
Contribute $50 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{50}})
Contribute $100 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{100}})
Contribute $250 (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amount={{250}})
Give another amount (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc?refcode=lk-jtmt-email-20230223-mc&amounts={{ amounts }})

I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,

Jon

name: Katie Porter
subject: A metaphor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Have you ever paid top dollar for a last minute plane ticket?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=18240%2E3422442%2EY36L1c)
Derek, have you ever paid top dollar for a last minute plane ticket? And you end up in a middle seat, _and_ with a connection, all because you didn’t book the flight a while back?
This isn’t an email about airline ticket prices (although I have fought against monopolies that drive up ticket costs). It’s to show you why donations given _now_ make such a difference.
When we’re able to make TV ad reservations far in advance, we get better rates and better options. **If we have to scramble to make reservations, we’re left paying top dollar for 3 AM spots.**
**[Can you make a contribution today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230223-1?refcode=em20230223-1&refcode2=18240_3422442_Y36L1c&akid=18240%2E3422442%2EY36L1c)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230223-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF23_1_DON_20230223_V1_F&refcode2=18240_3422442_Y36L1c&akid=18240%2E3422442%2EY36L1c)**
Investing in our campaign early on gives us the best chance at success. Another candidate started this race with three times the cash we began with, and it’s important we catch up sooner rather than later. Thanks so much for being on Team Porter.
Katie
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230223-1?refcode=EMAF23_1_DON_20230223_V1_F&refcode2=18240_3422442_Y36L1c&akid=18240%2E3422442%2EY36L1c)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF23_1_DON_20230223_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=18240_3422442_Y36L1c&akid=18240%2E3422442%2EY36L1c)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=18240%2E3422442%2EY36L1c)

clean_body: | | | | | KEEP UP WITH DARIN | | | | | We had the pleasure of welcoming Florida Governor Ron DeSantis to Illinois this past week as part of his Back the Blue tour. In Illinois, crime is rising and Governor Pritzker’s anti-police agenda is harming our communities. Illinois should take a page out of Governor DeSantis’ playbook of backing law enforcement and prosecuting violent criminals. I will always support the police in Congress, and I am grateful to Governor DeSantis for making the trip. I joined Morning Answer on AM560 the Answer to discuss Governor DeSantis’ visit. Again, thank you Governor Ron DeSantis for your visit to the great state of Illinois! | As House Republicans work to fulfill our promises to the American people, we will be keenly focused on combating threats from The Chinese Communist Party. I joined the Economist Podcast to discuss how our Republican Majority will combat these threats. | | | "Let's remember what their reaction was when we asked about the balloon. They said it was a meteorological or weather balloon. No one believes that." | CELEBRATING PRESIDENT'S DAY Thank you to these brave men for paving the way, not just for our party, but for our nation. Today, we celebrate you! | ON A PERSONAL NOTE I am honored to serve Illinois in Congress and wanted to share an update with you as we close out February. Our House Republican majority is in full swing working place a check on the Biden Administration, reduce inflation, curb violent crime, and secure the border. Thank you to all of the Illinois conservatives that have reached out to share their advice and thoughts as we begin this Congress. I am grateful to each of you for your support.\- Congressman Darin LaHood | Until Next Time, Team LaHood | | | What to help fuel Darin's fight against the radical left? name: Josh Stein
subject: let’s build a brighter future for North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
With your help, we can defeat Republican extremism and build an even brighter future for our state.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59150282/393367430/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230223-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTQ2MTIxYy1hZGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9123eFOemCLK8wnbFt_pCsjCU1x4LqcWC41GRCg2ZIU=)
---
Hi Peter,

As I talk to voters and supporters about my campaign for Governor, I’m getting asked a lot of important questions. You deserve to hear the answers directly from me.

[_**Please continue reading, but then, I’d like to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Valerie Foushee. You can chip in here when you’re ready.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59150283/393367437/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230223-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTQ2MTIxYy1hZGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9123eFOemCLK8wnbFt_pCsjCU1x4LqcWC41GRCg2ZIU=)

Why are you running for Governor?

_Easy — because I love North Carolina. We are a great state! And if we invest in our people and their futures, we can be even greater.

I’ve taken on big fights for the people of North Carolina over the past six years as your Attorney General — the opioid epidemic, untested rape kits, voting rights, polluted drinking water, and more — and won! That’s exactly what I’ll do as Governor. I’ll fight for us to have a thriving economy, safe communities, and strong schools.

But some politicians want to take us backward — to gerrymander our state to hold onto power, to restrict access to women’s reproductive health care, to tell you who you can marry, and rig the system to help their powerful friends while North Carolina families fall behind._

_With your help, we can defeat Republican extremism and build an even brighter future for our state._

North Carolina is a competitive state. Can you win it?

_It’s no secret that North Carolina elections come down to just a handful of votes. But I’ve taken on tough fights before — and won. I’ve won two statewide elections in North Carolina even though both times Donald Trump carried the state.

I will win this race just as I always have — by listening to and connecting with voters, sticking to our shared North Carolina values, and building a coalition of supporters across the state.

The Cook Political Report recently analyzed the 2024 North Carolina Governor’s race and concluded it’s a lean Democratic seat. But we have to run like we’re behind. We can’t take anything for granted._

How can I help?

_Believe it or not, JUST by reading this email, you are helping us out. We need to get the word out to voters and Democratic allies about what this campaign stands for and how we plan to win this tough race.

But we also need resources. A battleground state like ours is sure to attract millions in outside spending, and we have to be ready to respond to the attack ads. Any amount you can give today is an investment in the future of our campaign and our state._

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to our campaign today and help me build the brighter future North Carolina deserves.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59150284/393367444/-522906310?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230223-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTQ2MTIxYy1hZGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9123eFOemCLK8wnbFt_pCsjCU1x4LqcWC41GRCg2ZIU=)

clean_body: With your help, we can defeat Republican extremism and build an even brighter future for our state. | = Hi Peter, As I talk to voters and supporters about my campaign for Governor, I’m getting asked a lot of important questions. You deserve to hear the answers directly from me. = Why are you running for Governor? Easy — because I love North Carolina. We are a great state! And if we invest in our people and their futures, we can be even greater. I’ve taken on big fights for the people of North Carolina over the past six years as your Attorney General — the opioid epidemic, untested rape kits, voting rights, polluted drinking water, and more — and won! That’s exactly what I’ll do as Governor. I’ll fight for us to have a thriving economy, safe communities, and strong schools. But some politicians want to take us backward — to gerrymander our state to hold onto power, to restrict access to women’s reproductive health care, to tell you who you can marry, and rig the system to help their powerful friends while North Carolina families fall behind. With your help, we can defeat Republican extremism and build an even brighter future for our state. North Carolina is a competitive state. Can you win it? It’s no secret that North Carolina elections come down to just a handful of votes. But I’ve taken on tough fights before — and won. I’ve won two statewide elections in North Carolina even though both times Donald Trump carried the state. I will win this race just as I always have — by listening to and connecting with voters, sticking to our shared North Carolina values, and building a coalition of supporters across the state. The Cook Political Report recently analyzed the 2024 North Carolina Governor’s race and concluded it’s a lean Democratic seat. But we have to run like we’re behind. We can’t take anything for granted. How can I help? Believe it or not, JUST by reading this email, you are helping us out. We need to get the word out to voters and Democratic allies about what this campaign stands for and how we plan to win this tough race. But we also need resources. A battleground state like ours is sure to attract millions in outside spending, and we have to be ready to respond to the attack ads. Any amount you can give today is an investment in the future of our campaign and our state. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Josh Stein * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. body:
Trump’s Trifecta: 24 Hours Of NEEDED Leadership

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650019%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8nKH1jji%2fjBHnf9dn3%2fDyw&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c650010%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fYJlpnJ3dmtG3EZ0nSTWEw&sysid=1 Breaking: FTX Founder Sam Bankman-Fried Hit with New Charges and Faces Decades More in Prison

FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried faces potentially decades more in prison as new charges are added to superseding indictment, including conspiracy to operate an unlicensed money transmitting business and conspiracy to make unlawful political contributions and defraud the Securities and Exchange Commission.
