body:
Last week, I had the pleasure of traveling back home to Vermont for my first official in-district trip as a United States Representative!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59154986/393370245/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxNzk3Zi1iMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZzjByJjq2kGy_zgZKN-NSAkloGf3nzWt6eMcTSf1TI=&emci=e3f19682-a3b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ca91797f-b0b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Dear Peter, Last week, I had the pleasure of being back home in Southeast Vermont for my first official in-district trip as a United States Representative! First, I was honored to meet with individuals who recently arrived in this country as refugees or asylum-seekers at the Ethiopian Community Development Council in Brattleboro. My office remains committed to serving Vermont’s refugees and asylum-seekers. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59154989/393370246/-412511982?refcode=E20371-20230223-VermontTrip-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxNzk3Zi1iMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZzjByJjq2kGy_zgZKN-NSAkloGf3nzWt6eMcTSf1TI=) Services for our aging communities often do not get the attention they deserve, so I was grateful for the opportunity to volunteer at Foodworks, the region’s most heavily utilized food shelf program, during its senior shopping hour. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59154991/393370250/-412511982?refcode=E20371-20230223-VermontTrip-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxNzk3Zi1iMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZzjByJjq2kGy_zgZKN-NSAkloGf3nzWt6eMcTSf1TI=) Infrastructure is always top of mind for me when I travel home and see our state’s housing, bridges and public transportation, so I was grateful for the opportunity to attend the release of Vermont’s Infrastructure Report Card. An all-female team of engineers and state leaders led the presentation! Making our infrastructure more equitable is one of my top priorities in Congress. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59154992/393370251/-412511982?refcode=E20371-20230223-VermontTrip-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxNzk3Zi1iMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZzjByJjq2kGy_zgZKN-NSAkloGf3nzWt6eMcTSf1TI=) Before heading back to DC, I was also honored to have an inauguration celebration in Vermont with community members and campaign supporters. My friend, former Vermont Supreme Court Justice Marilyn Skoglund, performed a ceremonial swearing-in. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59154993/393370252/-412511982?refcode=E20371-20230223-VermontTrip-graphic-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxNzk3Zi1iMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZzjByJjq2kGy_zgZKN-NSAkloGf3nzWt6eMcTSf1TI=) This trip home to Vermont was a powerful reminder of why I ran for Congress in the first place: To be a voice for all Vermonters — especially for those who have been silenced — and make sure that no one gets left behind. **Vermonters deserve nothing less.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59154994/393370253/-412511982?refcode=E20371-20230223-VermontTrip-SB-CampaignNews-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTkxNzk3Zi1iMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZZzjByJjq2kGy_zgZKN-NSAkloGf3nzWt6eMcTSf1TI=) Yours, Becca Balint
---

* * *

body:
|

| | We need *your* help to send these anti-choice, anti-democracy representatives packing
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59155533/393370498/-949190215?sourceid=1048670&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDJjOTljYy1iMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TIPAnQ7m9-TGhEU-C5QkDf81S2UmRtO0hKtczsfiXjU=&emci=f0ea24c6-b0b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=002c99cc-b0b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) We're running a 48-hour $100,000 Flash Fund to pool our resources to replace 23 "On Notice" House Republicans who are using their power to undermine reproductive health care for millions — and we're falling behind on reaching our goal, Peter. **Donate towards our $100,000 goal before _midnight_ to help recruit and elect the Democratic pro-choice women who can send these House Republicans packing:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59155534/393370499/-949190215?sourceid=1048670&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMDJjOTljYy1iMGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TIPAnQ7m9-TGhEU-C5QkDf81S2UmRtO0hKtczsfiXjU=&emci=f0ea24c6-b0b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=002c99cc-b0b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

Yesterday, EMILYs List announced our list of 23 anti-choice House Republicans that we've officially placed "On Notice" — and we're raising $100,000 dedicated to _flipping_ their seats in 2024.

Here's the thing: Republicans gained the House majority last November, and after the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , every day we inch closer to witnessing the passage of a _national abortion ban_.

Hitting this $100,000 goal is essential to gaining the necessary resources we need to get these GOP extremists out of office, but our deadline is fast approaching and we're falling behind. subject: ** 200-ft Vulcan rocket in AL **

body:
Read this article about Alabama’s exploration excellence >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/057cf5a73ac6dabf/f6c6ed559fab7e87c3d6b838967d376c/33013)

---
Peter, **Congratulations to Decatur’s own United Launch Alliance (ULA) for reminding the world why America happens in Alabama!** I’m incredibly honored to know ULA – and all those involved in producing the first new Vulcan rocket – chose our great state to fuel this nation’s future exploration... _AND BEYOND!_ **The new ~200-ft-tall Vulcan rocket also features two main engines built in Huntsville.** A true testament to the hardworking, entrepreneurial spirit that resides in the heart of every single Alabamian. I know this is just the first of many new marvels we’ll see.
---

---
Alabama Proud, Coach

Friend,

I was reading the news this morning and came across an article that made my skin crawl.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ea35e0684e448adabdaf41038aadcc9&_e=gH4_Gly6jlNn_ucIsF4pCbHA23V7bPPZkknvayYulZ-1RaWcUrWmOezsMtlNnZz42KwEGffZTzEUb-sLUbwSJuWUUlLSfGtrkdv90obecloa96b-dfQZFEfxT-TVUVIQ8AwSSwQXquXcj_WJZVF54tTinwzGjazLZ7MVWXYdBxHgnc89QNoVUtpFjkCulUo6y7AXiQUqxkYovLyREn18cqUo8suhW6Wm-IVpjC8lXH3mfo2KDHWlKycpl2oigdSCOtn9lWwIoCktOWjbi_CNPoYzSNIX4ejDOmA1j0RGhOKhnOBwLL9zotzqmr0-Hx7MKcCpuIRB1DpsQ_YovDqXD4gT9LB4kOXc-bmX_Uth3fa8pR4dwqAPTEs3Sh75UGo_GAgHX0lcOroHGdnxWsgObcK9Rxyf-_tfuTiph7ryzZxRxOsTRf61Iqy3hK5wGpifCcK1HbcI1xv1Y2uYxw9qTn54rzi_Y_aAZ3DeOE_ZPI4%3D)
This is no joke, Friend. The radical left is poised to spend **BILLIONS** (yes, you read that right) of dollars on electing socialist candidates all across the country.

The war they are waging is far-reaching, and nothing is off the table. From local school-board elections to the White House, they won't rest until they've re-shaped every aspect of our lives to fit their agenda. And they have their Hollywood donors to back them up and their Big Tech cronies to shut us down. That is why it is so important that we stand up to them and win.

We can't do that unless we have a mass of conservative warriors ready to lead the charge. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Friend. **I want to talk to you about my best friend in the Senate, John Barrasso. **

John is a Senator from Wyoming, and he's one of the few people in Washington fighting, day and night, against the leftist woke ideology. He's in the trenches with me to hold China accountable, defend the Second Amendment, advance school choice, and he is DEMANDING American energy independence. _**He 's the sort of guy that belongs in the Senate.**_

But he needs your help, Friend. With the left's tsunami of spending coming our way, John needs your help to make sure Republicans are ready to hit back and hit back hard.
**[Please, if you're able, can you chip in $5, $10, $25, or any amount that you can to help us take on the left? >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9ea35e0684e448adabdaf41038aadcc9&_e=gH4_Gly6jlNn_ucIsF4pCbHA23V7bPPZkknvayYulZ-1RaWcUrWmOezsMtlNnZz42KwEGffZTzEUb-sLUbwSJuWUUlLSfGtrkdv90obecloa96b-dfQZFEfxT-TVUVIQ8AwSSwQXquXcj_WJZVF54tTinwzGjazLZ7MVWXYdBxHgnc89QNoVUtpFjkCulUo6y7AXiQUqxkYovLyREn18cqUo8suhW6Wm-IVpjC8lXH3mfo2KDHWlKycpl2oigdSCOtn9lWwIoCktOWjbi_CNPoYzSNIX4ejDOmA1j0RGhOKhnOBwLL9zotzqmr0-Hx7MnGwHBc2x08XT4K5hFEx9CH0I_PXgQkSL1HLx6i1gYefEo3aRUxCJskSSAMcyIKcY0OCJ7g0-HslvdM2CopIJJZtn4i8jo6hdZDIHvemxwttEso_eWexCyZbZjdib086sWAycA0GdDxMKlPpNUE4S11zdniFDQ5GXR-YSJ1q1Ook%3D)**

clean_body: Will you help my friend? Friend, I was reading the news this morning and came across an article that made my skin crawl. This is no joke, Friend. The radical left is poised to spend BILLIONS (yes, you read that right) of dollars on electing socialist candidates all across the country. The war they are waging is far-reaching, and nothing is off the table. From local school-board elections to the White House, they won't rest until they've re-shaped every aspect of our lives to fit their agenda. And they have their Hollywood donors to back them up and their Big Tech cronies to shut us down. That is why it is so important that we stand up to them and win. We can't do that unless we have a mass of conservative warriors ready to lead the charge. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, Friend. I want to talk to you about my best friend in the Senate, John Barrasso. John is a Senator from Wyoming, and he's one of the few people in Washington fighting, day and night, against the leftist woke ideology. He's in the trenches with me to hold China accountable, defend the Second Amendment, advance school choice, and he is DEMANDING American energy independence. He 's the sort of guy that belongs in the Senate. But he needs your help, Friend. With the left's tsunami of spending coming our way, John needs your help to make sure Republicans are ready to hit back and hit back hard. It might not seem like much, but I promise your support will make the difference between who controls the power in Washington. ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Tim Scott ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jon Tester
subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15702?t=6&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP) Folks, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: **I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana.**

I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. [**If you’re with me, please split a donation between Ron Be Gone and my campaign right now to become a Founding Donor. If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15703?t=7&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split evenly between Jon Tester and Ron Be Gone immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15709?t=13&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15710?t=14&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15711?t=15&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP)
I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago.

They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running.

It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.**
[**I can’t do it without your support, Team. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15703?t=16&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split evenly between Jon Tester and Ron Be Gone immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15709?t=22&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15710?t=23&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/15711?t=24&akid=1695%2E564421%2E6FG4wP)
I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate.

**And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.**

It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all.

Thanks,

Jon
| | Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc.
(www.ronbegone.com)

name: Britainy Beshear
subject: Andy unites us through our shared values
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Help Andy continue leading us toward a bigger and better tomorrow. Peter,

In a moment, [**I want to ask you to join me in supporting Andy by chipping in to his re-election campaign before his end-of-month deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59156447/393374957/-500812825?refcode=em23_230223_eom1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230223_eom1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=34223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE3YzFhMS1iNGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POScBGpg-f1WuMn6y7HaMIDTczzGT7BCR9AriviTwoE=) But first, I want to think back to 2019.

I remember the moment we knew Andy had won. I recall the hope and uplifting spirit we all felt as Andy delivered his victory speech to a crowd of supporters.

**Andy ran for governor in 2019 because he knew he had what it took to lead our Commonwealth forward at a time when political divisions nationwide never seemed wider.**

He ran to fight for every Kentuckian — whether you live in rural or urban Kentucky or eastern, western, northern, or central Kentucky. Andy has united us through our shared values: hard work, faith, and belief in a bigger and better tomorrow.

And by coming together, our Commonwealth has made great strides forward. These have been some of the most prosperous years for Kentucky. I know that Andy is determined to continue making progress for our Commonwealth – but he has another tough fight ahead of him.

Andy is facing 12 Republican opponents, and the attacks against him have already started. We're once again counting on grassroots supporters like you to ensure Andy has the resources to win this reelection for the people of Kentucky. Can we count on you?

[**Help Andy continue leading us toward a bigger and better tomorrow. Donate before the February end-of-month deadline, and help this team build a strong campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59156448/393374959/-500812825?refcode=em23_230223_eom1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230223_eom1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=34223&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE3YzFhMS1iNGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POScBGpg-f1WuMn6y7HaMIDTczzGT7BCR9AriviTwoE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59156450/393374960/-500812825?refcode=em23_230223_eom1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230223_eom1_fnd_gq_act___BB_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=34223&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE3YzFhMS1iNGIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POScBGpg-f1WuMn6y7HaMIDTczzGT7BCR9AriviTwoE=)

subject: $5 is all it could take
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
to support Republican victories.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

[**Join us on March 21st to 23rd for OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59156668/393376240/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTIwNzIxLWI1YjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=709lHBs9wuOPC2NgnsCN_Ln2En3XGpnOrUo5i7fFIUU=&emci=8b7c2f69-adb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=eca20721-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) We made it even easier to participate this year. You don’t have to drive to Salem. You don’t have to spend an entire day on Zoom. All you have to do is pull up to your computer. And, in total, it will only be about four hours of your time over a couple days. **OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd**
The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon
**Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm** – Priority Presentations & Training (all participants)
**Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm** – Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16
**Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm** – Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30
[You can look up your senate district (SD) here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59156670/393376242/1765198759?appid=fd070b56c975456ea2a25f7e3f4289d1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTIwNzIxLWI1YjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=709lHBs9wuOPC2NgnsCN_Ln2En3XGpnOrUo5i7fFIUU=&emci=8b7c2f69-adb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=eca20721-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)
Place: Entirely on Zoom (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior)
[**RSVP today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59156671/393376245/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTIwNzIxLWI1YjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=709lHBs9wuOPC2NgnsCN_Ln2En3XGpnOrUo5i7fFIUU=&emci=8b7c2f69-adb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=eca20721-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) In 2021, I attended the OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Day as a volunteer. I had a great time! Living in Bend, it’s not easy to get to Salem. With a virtual lobby day, it made it possible for me to show up for what I care about - stronger climate action and environmental justice. It was an incredible experience to join with so many others from the environmental community all across the state. This year, I am excited to be an engagement organizer at OLCV and helping plan our upcoming lobby days. Whether you have joined us for the Clean Green Lobby Machine year after year or this is your first time at an OLCV/OCN Lobby Day, we are excited to have you [join in](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59156672/393376246/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTIwNzIxLWI1YjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=709lHBs9wuOPC2NgnsCN_Ln2En3XGpnOrUo5i7fFIUU=&emci=8b7c2f69-adb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=eca20721-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230)! We will have a training and staff support throughout to make sure you can make the most of your lobby days for the environment. You will also get to hear the latest on what’s happening in Salem - the good and the bad. Whether you are in Bend, Beaverton, or beyond, we hope you join in to make 2023 a big year for climate action and environmental protection. [RSVP today for the OLCV/OCN Lobby Days on March 21st to 23rd!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/59156673/393376247/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjYTIwNzIxLWI1YjMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=709lHBs9wuOPC2NgnsCN_Ln2En3XGpnOrUo5i7fFIUU=&emci=8b7c2f69-adb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=eca20721-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) I will see you there! clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Want to make a difference for our environment and climate from your couch or kitchen table? We made it even easier to participate this year. You don’t have to drive to Salem. You don’t have to spend an entire day on Zoom. All you have to do is pull up to your computer. And, in total, it will only be about four hours of your time over a couple days. OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm – Priority Presentations & Training (all participants) Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm – Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16 Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm – Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30 Place: Entirely on Zoom (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior) In 2021, I attended the OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Day as a volunteer. I had a great time! Living in Bend, it’s not easy to get to Salem. With a virtual lobby day, it made it possible for me to show up for what I care about - stronger climate action and environmental justice. It was an incredible experience to join with so many others from the environmental community all across the state. This year, I am excited to be an engagement organizer at OLCV and helping plan our upcoming lobby days. Whether you have joined us for the Clean Green Lobby Machine year after year or this is your first time at an OLCV/OCN Lobby Day, we are excited to have you ! We will have a training and staff support throughout to make sure you can make the most of your lobby days for the environment. You will also get to hear the latest on what’s happening in Salem - the good and the bad. Whether you are in Bend, Beaverton, or beyond, we hope you join in to make 2023 a big year for climate action and environmental protection. I will see you there! Sam Lewis, OLCV Bend Engagement Organizer | | ---|---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters. | ---|---

**The GOP has no answers for the problems rural Americans like us are facing.**

They want to pass a constitutional amendment to ban abortion and criminalize women and their doctors. They want to kill the union way of life, and are more than happy to ship your job overseas if it means a penny more in profit. They want to put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block, ripping away working folks’ hard-earned benefits.

**Our country deserves better than Kevin McCarthy and the radical GOP. That’s why it’s all hands on deck to take back the House in 2024.**

[**If you’re with me, I’d be so grateful if you join my team by splitting a few dollars between my grassroots campaign and United Rural Democrats today. Is there anything you can give to help us keep rural America, like PA-17, blue in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59157009/393378452/-1545536261?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.23_b1_ccd_ra&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Y2Y1NzdlMC1iNmIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aOpCb8jAu3li-Q6pXO5-U9SmZ-F0YvkHl9UtaIVfpH8=)

Chris Deluzio

__ | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. clean_body: | = Hi Derek, I wanted to take a quick moment to introduce myself and ask you to join my fight with the help of United Rural Democrats to protect rural Pennsylvania from the radical GOP targeting our communities. As a father, voting rights lawyer, Iraq War veteran, and someone who helped organize a union, I ran for Congress to fight for the common good and our shared prosperity. Now that I’m in Congress, I am committed to building a future that leaves no one behind and a government that takes care of all of us. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = The GOP has no answers for the problems rural Americans like us are facing. They want to pass a constitutional amendment to ban abortion and criminalize women and their doctors. They want to kill the union way of life, and are more than happy to ship your job overseas if it means a penny more in profit. They want to put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block, ripping away working folks’ hard-earned benefits. Our country deserves better than Kevin McCarthy and the radical GOP. That’s why it’s all hands on deck to take back the House in 2024. = Thank you, and let’s get to work, Chris Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to share with you another reason why it's so important that we remain ever vigilant and ALWAYS stay in the fight to defend our great country from dangerous and destructive policies.

Just a few days ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a measure making sure that non-citizens are not allowed vote in Washington DC elections.

Sounds like a no-brainer, right? I mean, who the heck would support a crazy idea like non-citizens voting in American elections?

I'll tell you who would support it: the vast majority of House Democrats would! **And they did! By a 4-to-1 margin!**

Despite their incessant anti-Trump tropes being laden with claims of "foreign influence in elections", they call it "controversial" for conservatives to say that only American citizens should vote in American elections. I'm not making this up!

We all know that liberals want to fundamentally change our great country, and this latest move fits their playbook to a tee. They want weaker border security, they don't support law enforcement, and now they have shown they want to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections.

They weren't successful this time, but when considering that Biden's border policy is allowing record levels of illegal immigration, and Democrats are raising record levels of money for their campaigns, we should all be scared for the future of our country if the left makes gains in the next election.

I know you receive a lot of fundraising emails, but if you've read this far, I know you share my concern. **[If that's true, I'm asking you to step up and take action to let me know you join with other patriots like yourself to support the fundamental principles that make America great!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2a6592a7fb374a25bf9b7dec6765ff7d&_e=lIhoHB99MW3ebvlCqHIsMQ_CVsK93MZjzF0vrez48IzLkdVvFIfv55fHpDKSl9ogbr3jql0sTmc2L2vSxNieywbxw6KwiGSYZzzr6pWvcWlkRWLsKmH3IUFgjwHqtkA5zQpPtphZX7w94ZvEDK2ANAhT8sntDL0rguGDaxrbbnTIOBc9ny3ZyfOq9oqXileqqlIwzVsKFMVvM6M1T6KZZHn68liJ-7-G8H05mdBKIqv5RRwZnQKKBvLNMLLvGx6T_ST9z_xvC53blk9eu5a0nbg9_hUuZoONh7F5BgiJslL5fib3Ufb4Lh76fAts51jfH6XkxMrjKViDUxsDSL6dTOgjPR4s9X-kUNfm0Juo0j-c8rMAcHTNAiPD9yC6j7eNTNMZuHES55PKlinOxTCEu0WYY1GBnBSdLH38o6xb-YETiZvOOZGCWAhsX6Tr4JAkS5gRE175GbuNqYouh9-L9Q%3D%3D)**

Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: | Peter — Republicans launched their first attack ads against Tammy last week. And one thing is for sure — this won’t be the last time they go after our campaign. With election experts already saying that this race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation, we know that the GOP will spend a fortune on countless more attack ads misrepresenting Tammy’s record — saying and spending whatever it takes to try to defeat her in 2024. = | = ** Republicans and their right-wing allies will throw everything they’ve got at us to flip Wisconsin and reclaim the Senate majority. Between now and next November, they’ll use every possible tactic to misrepresent Tammy’s record and mislead voters about what she stands for. With your support, we can stand up to those lies, defend the truth, and show voters what Tammy really believes in. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you for your continued support. Peter,

We’re just five days away from our next end-of-month deadline. This is the shortest month of the year, so we don’t have as much time to hit our monthly fundraising goal – but it’s just as important that we meet all of our goals so that we are prepared for anything that comes our way.

This was the most expensive race in the state last year, and there’s no doubt that Republicans are keeping an eye on our district as they try to hold onto their slim majority in the House. If we’re going to take back the House majority next year, we absolutely must keep this seat **BLUE**. [_**Will you chip in $5 (or more!) right now ahead of our next end-of-month deadline? my new book and more. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5bc746d544b3/ari-fleischer-on-beyond-the-briefing-1207152?e=f6564bbe3b)

| | | | | | | | |
# Order my new kids book...
Americans need content we can trust to provide to our children! As such, I’ve written my first-ever children’s book that reveals the dangers of fake news. As you guys know, this is a topic I know a thing or two about...Written for kids 4-12, this book tells a fun story about 2 amazing characters named Bongo and Asher who are preparing for the biggest baseball game of the year. However, a sneaky band of parrots is determined to ruin Bongo and Asher’s reputations by spreading fake news about them.The book will be released on March 1st, but my email list gets exclusive access to get it now on pre-order! Plus get **FREE shipping** with code “**SPICER** ”.Hurry up before this one sells out. It’s sure to be a home run with the whole family, and thats not fake news.

clean_body: Will you join me in supporting him? | Friend, Former Indiana Congresswoman Susan Brooks here, and I am proud to endorse Jim Banks for Senate. Jim is a real conservative with a proven track record of fighting for our Hoosier values. I cannot think of a better person than him to represent Indiana in the United States Senate. But we can’t turn things around without your support. Jim Banks is counting on us. | Jim will continue the fight to cut big government, strengthen our economy, rebuild our military, and care for our veterans. Jim Banks is the best choice to represent Indiana in the United States Senate. Thank you, Susan Brooks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

subject: Abortion access threatened in all 50 states

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159827/393388482/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ4OTc2YS1jMmIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeEOX8KNjhp2XN7Ymp0eoc8Xj5bJvIM9q8YXKTB8sTk=&emci=a393c3d1-bbb3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=0148976a-c2b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9494239)

| | After _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned by the Supreme Court, putting abortion regulation in the hands of the states, many Americans were worried that right-wing anti-abortion activists would go further and attempt to try to ban abortion nationwide. Those worries are well-founded. Here is what you need to know: 23 years ago, the FDA approved mifepristone as a safe and effective medication to end a pregnancy. Despite millions of Americans successfully using mifepristone, **a federal judge in Texas could issue a nationwide injunction blocking the FDA's approval as soon as _tomorrow_.** The FDA is calling it "extraordinary and unprecedented". I call it outrageous and dangerous. More than half of all abortions in America are done through medication abortion — the "abortion pill" — and it is possible that this ruling will immediately ban the use of this medication _nationwide,_ before there has even been a trial to determine the facts, much less appeals to higher courts. If this right-wing judge blocks access to abortion nationwide, Congress must act. If Congress cannot act, we need to elect pro-choice champions nationwide. **[Chip in now to help build the movement to elect a pro-choice majority in the US House.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59159828/393388483/1596212816?refcode=2023-02-23-abortion&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0148976a-c2b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTQ4OTc2YS1jMmIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PeEOX8KNjhp2XN7Ymp0eoc8Xj5bJvIM9q8YXKTB8sTk=)** clean_body: | | | | After Roe v. Wade was overturned by the Supreme Court, putting abortion regulation in the hands of the states, many Americans were worried that right-wing anti-abortion activists would go further and attempt to try to ban abortion nationwide. Those worries are well-founded. Here is what you need to know: 23 years ago, the FDA approved mifepristone as a safe and effective medication to end a pregnancy. Despite millions of Americans successfully using mifepristone, a federal judge in Texas could issue a nationwide injunction blocking the FDA's approval as soon as tomorrow. The FDA is calling it "extraordinary and unprecedented". I call it outrageous and dangerous. More than half of all abortions in America are done through medication abortion — the "abortion pill" — and it is possible that this ruling will immediately ban the use of this medication nationwide, before there has even been a trial to determine the facts, much less appeals to higher courts. If this right-wing judge blocks access to abortion nationwide, Congress must act. If Congress cannot act, we need to elect pro-choice champions nationwide. = We do not have a moment to lose. name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m just a dirt farmer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59166083/393437875/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2377-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJhN2Q4Ny1lY2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gSZkq04-Nj1ms9L7YlLDEkL87nzsHCvcmhiaSCM35A=)
Hi there, can I tell you a little story about me?

I grew up on my family’s farm, and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.
When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there – but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.

Here’s why I’m telling you this: Just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, **my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.**
With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.

**I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.**
[**I’m officially running for reelection, so here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of my campaign with a contribution, split between me and Jacky Rosen, to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59166084/393437876/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2377-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJhN2Q4Ny1lY2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gSZkq04-Nj1ms9L7YlLDEkL87nzsHCvcmhiaSCM35A=)
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59166085/393437877/1743277108?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2377-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjJhN2Q4Ny1lY2IzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gSZkq04-Nj1ms9L7YlLDEkL87nzsHCvcmhiaSCM35A=)
---
You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong, and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.

I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.
Thanks again,

Jon

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Who should be allowed to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Show the Left that I'm not the only American who thinks only Americans should be allowed to vote in our elections.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cfab5775e8c741eeb8e2fe81dc7b4cff&_e=cMycmesH9WsN5O7ofoNsKpP8HudNKhMIqMmRstDskfF4ePWY0ZWXgol5ZiXIGDKX8NzmzPFWcvEoKMG2qCX76AyiDZjAyVo3Q8nhGs9PQbHdFm5hBnOfOey4_69Z2iisPxqnt2OaRwqevXY7U32u8rYP_W0ysu6AgB9Fcoe9mlZEi0YOYi6RdXf3dmHw-v_YbndUaA1arI4tgRZ_Vgh8hjskH9rSNf03hY91GfIIGlJP6xYjvPdvth5ZLH0NnIkZzLNGmKasaMZndHeUQzkEuuW1RtrDUEF9gRQv961kTaV2Gelsj4cmEwskMtuu4vb6Bl6X2LoH9MXQJwftjYdikQkr48vl4aYbJTegeLrPh3axo4dpNVuTFlnwjmR5QBZItiENn4750di1vrqA9KBbbGHoNJzW8bCBBZUX4J9lcBVgzfJcZ2Z1k36DjkqxzhUOQHOcm47go0fi1q0jLQUDhA%3D%3D)
|
[**Petition: Do you agree that illegal immigrants should not be allowed to vote in our elections -> **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cfab5775e8c741eeb8e2fe81dc7b4cff&_e=cMycmesH9WsN5O7ofoNsKpP8HudNKhMIqMmRstDskfF4ePWY0ZWXgol5ZiXIGDKX8NzmzPFWcvEoKMG2qCX76AyiDZjAyVo3Q8nhGs9PQbHdFm5hBnOfOey4_69Z2iisPxqnt2OaRwqevXY7U32u8rYP_W0ysu6AgB9Fcoe9mlZEi0YOYi6RdXf3dmHw-v_YbndUaA1arI4tgRZ_Vgh8hjskH9rSNf03hY91GfIIGlJP6xYjvPdvth5ZLH0NnIkZzLNGmKasaMZndHeUQzkEuuW1RtrDUEF9gRQv961kTaV2Gelsj4cmEwskMtuu4vb6dGck4F1rDeAsX9xbVrPpzqSgkNEwnJTt4FLRWvdr9ID6ob4f_FtzS4A4r-va1LNR_2uaws2EZFcTde8uXl2lj-XQl6cApJRl7C1f5RHSHAjg25sleJqlwfd_akasgb4R3Jnt3DHgwFWJ_n30JAVE9g%3D%3D)
Fellow Conservative,

I wanted to share with you another reason why it's so important that we remain ever vigilant and ALWAYS stay in the fight to defend our great country from dangerous and destructive policies.

Just a few days ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a measure making sure that non-citizens are not allowed vote in Washington DC elections.

Sounds like a no-brainer, right? I mean, who the heck would support a crazy idea like non-citizens voting in American elections?

I'll tell you who would support it: the vast majority of House Democrats would! **And they did! By a 4-to-1 margin!**

Despite their incessant anti-Trump tropes being laden with claims of "foreign influence in elections", they call it "controversial" for conservatives to say that only American citizens should vote in American elections. I'm not making this up!

We all know that liberals want to fundamentally change our great country, and this latest move fits their playbook to a tee. They want weaker border security, they don't support law enforcement, and now they have shown they want to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections.

They weren't successful this time, but when considering that Biden's border policy is allowing record levels of illegal immigration, and Democrats are raising record levels of money for their campaigns, we should all be scared for the future of our country if the left makes gains in the next election.

clean_body: Show the Left that I'm not the only American who thinks only Americans should be allowed to vote in our elections. | Fellow Conservative, I wanted to share with you another reason why it's so important that we remain ever vigilant and ALWAYS stay in the fight to defend our great country from dangerous and destructive policies. Just a few days ago, Republicans in the House of Representatives passed a measure making sure that non-citizens are not allowed vote in Washington DC elections. Sounds like a no-brainer, right? I mean, who the heck would support a crazy idea like non-citizens voting in American elections? I'll tell you who would support it: the vast majority of House Democrats would! And they did! By a 4-to-1 margin! Despite their incessant anti-Trump tropes being laden with claims of "foreign influence in elections", they call it "controversial" for conservatives to say that only American citizens should vote in American elections. I'm not making this up! We all know that liberals want to fundamentally change our great country, and this latest move fits their playbook to a tee. They want weaker border security, they don't support law enforcement, and now they have shown they want to allow non-citizens to vote in our elections. They weren't successful this time, but when considering that Biden's border policy is allowing record levels of illegal immigration, and Democrats are raising record levels of money for their campaigns, we should all be scared for the future of our country if the left makes gains in the next election. I know you receive a lot of fundraising emails, but if you've read this far, I know you share my concern. God Bless, Jim Jordan About Jim Jordan: | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. | Hey friend,

My name is Adrian Fontes, and thanks to supporters like you, I was elected as Arizona's Secretary of State this past November. I ran against one of the biggest liars and conspiracy theorists in the country, but Arizona voters overwhelmingly chose my vision of honesty and competent leadership.

In fact, Arizona voters sent a resounding message when it comes to MAGA Fascists and liars when it came to our statewide races – **they rejected all three of the Big Lie candidates, giving Democrats wins in my race, the Governor’s race and the Attorney General’s race for the first time since the 1970s.**

Despite that, our party came up just a few hundred votes short of flipping the state legislature. Sadly, the AZ legislature is still controlled by MAGA Fascists that continue to let lies and easily debunked nonsense get a full hearing in their legislative committees.

So that’s why I’m reaching out. _**As Secretary of State, I want to make voting better for Arizonans. I want to fix the real problems we have, come up with solutions that voters and election officials want, and put the nonsense behind us.**_ But I’m afraid that’s not possible with the current makeup of the Arizona legislature.

**[Flipping the final seats we need to control the Arizona legislature is a key priority this election cycle. That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation of $5, or anything you can afford, to help myself and the AZ Dems accomplish that goal.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xb0Qnyme-hjaUY1nYLK0U7rU7zaqFb3pAOU7GW-4QDfMV0inlTOukikl6DDd4G2Hdd2rLTg_8N3ZRhWZ2A9n7cPXbgPZIoXAlGuUFKZokihksje17-9nwYSahjI7Sa5iIL9hReV2H1QLwKCq321fYioK66tmIgdy8qVySOkb_yEoMElaVyyHxkjuONTokV4Mddjp7hm-hOQKtKUOZn0rEpDKWOO1W_h9opES1UUMnUujSokYNVyjzZfkcbpAC5aYLf_qgWIjeeZXxz9-mnU87eOgVdPGjk7K-Ib-nbY1dbkinSYUbpXoUyO71O3F8G63YAb7EU_TtsI4RyIbuMZbxct35yN132ekQnQNqgYzC0pG94EmZepegJCsbVK5xOKrjf9iFj3nSFqtqc1nZL8dcD/3ty/7o23ykCITZapIAwCcz1XYg/h1/X6jYzEvPkDGIVyEMTrWaZ4vLzvPpzXuB6lB_-YghqsI)**

clean_body: | | | Join me in continuing to turn Arizona blue | | | Hey friend, My name is Adrian Fontes, and thanks to supporters like you, I was elected as Arizona's Secretary of State this past November. I ran against one of the biggest liars and conspiracy theorists in the country, but Arizona voters overwhelmingly chose my vision of honesty and competent leadership. In fact, Arizona voters sent a resounding message when it comes to MAGA Fascists and liars when it came to our statewide races – they rejected all three of the Big Lie candidates, giving Democrats wins in my race, the Governor’s race and the Attorney General’s race for the first time since the 1970s. Despite that, our party came up just a few hundred votes short of flipping the state legislature. Sadly, the AZ legislature is still controlled by MAGA Fascists that continue to let lies and easily debunked nonsense get a full hearing in their legislative committees. So that’s why I’m reaching out. As Secretary of State, I want to make voting better for Arizonans. I want to fix the real problems we have, come up with solutions that voters and election officials want, and put the nonsense behind us. But I’m afraid that’s not possible with the current makeup of the Arizona legislature. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to the Arizona Democratic Party and Adrian Fontes: I appreciate all of your support. We sent a strong message about election lies last year – we have a chance to put it behind us for good by flipping the Arizona legislature in 2024. Adrian Fontes Arizona Secretary of State Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. clean_body: Joe Biden forgave $400 BILLION in student loan debts. But there’s a catch – he wants YOU to pay for it. | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden forgave $400 BILLION in student loan debts. But there 's a catch - he wants YOU to pay for it. That means millions of Americans who haven't gone to a college or university - or those who took out loans and worked their butts off to pay them back - will pay for someone 's tuition to attend a gender studies class. Team, I’m not going to dignify Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene’s horrifying comments by re-sharing them here, **but suffice it to say, these comments are dangerous and unbecoming of a member of Congress.**

Politicians that traffic outrage and extreme partisanship actively harm our democracy, their oath of office, and the very constituents they represent. **It’s beyond time for us to move past this hateful style of politics that values partisanship above all else.**

Folks, I’m lucky to be able to count on supporters across the political spectrum. From Democrats, to Republicans, to Independents – our movement is founded on a fundamental respect for one another as neighbors trying to move our communities forward.

And instead of focusing on what we disagree on, we come together on the things we agree on. **Ensuring our communities have safe drinking water, shepherding the conservation of our beautiful public lands, and fighting to lift up hard-working families everywhere.**

[**While some National Republicans seek to divide us further, I’m fighting for all of us. clean_body: It’s time for us to move past hateful politics | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Team, I’m not going to dignify Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene’s horrifying comments by re-sharing them here, but suffice it to say, these comments are dangerous and unbecoming of a member of Congress. Politicians that traffic outrage and extreme partisanship actively harm our democracy, their oath of office, and the very constituents they represent. It’s beyond time for us to move past this hateful style of politics that values partisanship above all else. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Folks, I’m lucky to be able to count on supporters across the political spectrum. From Democrats, to Republicans, to Independents – our movement is founded on a fundamental respect for one another as neighbors trying to move our communities forward. And instead of focusing on what we disagree on, we come together on the things we agree on. Ensuring our communities have safe drinking water, shepherding the conservation of our beautiful public lands, and fighting to lift up hard-working families everywhere. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you for your support, Raul Ruiz | | Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P.O. name: Team Schrier
subject: Lowering the cost of insulin is personal to Kim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We need to cap insulin costs for every American. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59161320/393394746/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmE5NWY5Yi1jOWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RVh-YL7TwMjixwSUmZMCqZAR7DuOnkVuBAa1pJTGJ6U=&emci=dd2e6b16-91b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d6a95f9b-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

When Kim was 16 years old, she was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes. Like the other 1.6 million people in America with Type 1 diabetes, she depends upon insulin to stay alive.

However, over the last 20 years, the price of insulin has skyrocketed due to Big Pharma’s greed – from $40 a vial to upwards of $300.

Lowering the cost of insulin is personal to Kim. That's why she was proud to help pass a $35 per month cap on insulin for seniors that went into effect at the beginning of the year. This insulin cap will make life saving medication more affordable for thousands of Americans, but we can't stop there.

At his State of the Union address, President Joe Biden called for an insulin cap for _all_ Americans. We got it done for seniors, now we need to finish the job and ensure every American can afford the lifesaving medication they need.

**[Are you with Kim and President Biden in the fight to lower prescription drug costs? Add your name to call for an insulin cap for every American →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59161325/393394751/1534647834?ms=em23_230223_rxpric_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230223_rxpric_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230223_rxpric_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230223_rxpric_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=/UH7uKdI/k8rrDQ4YuWaq4+TrDVni2OarRFA9rm9r9GrIwGps+NP7WcXdcCCb2slaX9w4VWt6bqPv9ABlWZMbbEOgQXEdoQdTaL/GOImKKUEukcNJsEsB/PwG24RnbAq9KSZ18ZpdCrI+vvunW+xHrEKcZ74tUs4SRlLfKVarqo=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmE5NWY5Yi1jOWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RVh-YL7TwMjixwSUmZMCqZAR7DuOnkVuBAa1pJTGJ6U=&emci=dd2e6b16-91b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d6a95f9b-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59161330/393394757/1534647834?ms=em23_230223_rxpric_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230223_rxpric_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230223_rxpric_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230223_rxpric_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=/UH7uKdI/k8rrDQ4YuWaq4+TrDVni2OarRFA9rm9r9GrIwGps+NP7WcXdcCCb2slaX9w4VWt6bqPv9ABlWZMbbEOgQXEdoQdTaL/GOImKKUEukcNJsEsB/PwG24RnbAq9KSZ18ZpdCrI+vvunW+xHrEKcZ74tUs4SRlLfKVarqo=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNmE5NWY5Yi1jOWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RVh-YL7TwMjixwSUmZMCqZAR7DuOnkVuBAa1pJTGJ6U=&emci=dd2e6b16-91b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d6a95f9b-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15820338)

Like the other 1.6 million people in America with Type 1 diabetes, she depends upon insulin to stay alive. However, over the last 20 years, the price of insulin has skyrocketed due to Big Pharma’s greed – from $40 a vial to upwards of $300. Lowering the cost of insulin is personal to Kim. That's why she was proud to help pass a $35 per month cap on insulin for seniors that went into effect at the beginning of the year. This insulin cap will make life saving medication more affordable for thousands of Americans, but we can't stop there. At his State of the Union address, President Joe Biden called for an insulin cap for all Americans. We got it done for seniors, now we need to finish the job and ensure every American can afford the lifesaving medication they need. | Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Roy Cooper
subject: We can deliver for working North Carolinians

body:
Regarding the state budget.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59161411/393394936/823540626?refcode=ea.1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzU3YTFiNy1jOWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfVnIEdROdsd5NlbcS3S6_YYOtBpVvlfDmkD-Igqay8=&emci=f9e33281-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)
Peter — When our government _works_ , we can make this state _work better_ for North Carolinians. But we can’t make progress when some politicians put the interests of the powerful and wealthy first. As we start negotiating the state budget for the upcoming fiscal year, I’m committed to prioritizing getting resources to the folks who need it most, and I hope Republican legislators will set politics aside and work with me. **[In this budget, we have the funds to increase teacher pay and school funding, provide quality child care for working families, and cover working family tax cuts. Now, I need you to show your support for these critical initiatives to make sure Republican legislators include them in a bipartisan agreement>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59161412/393394937/-482410932?refcode=ea.1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzU3YTFiNy1jOWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfVnIEdROdsd5NlbcS3S6_YYOtBpVvlfDmkD-Igqay8=&emci=f9e33281-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: Every child in North Carolina deserves an _excellent_ education — one that requires sufficient per-pupil funding. Helping working families access quality child care will also set young children up for success later on when they start school. Meanwhile, public school teachers are overworked and underpaid. No teacher should have to work a second or third job just to pay the rent. **[Prioritizing students, teachers, and families in the budget makes sense, and it’s the right thing to do to improve lives and create greater opportunities for North Carolina. Now, I need GOP legislators to deliver for working North Carolinians in a bipartisan budget. Sign on to show your support>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59161413/393394938/-482410932?refcode=ea.1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzU3YTFiNy1jOWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfVnIEdROdsd5NlbcS3S6_YYOtBpVvlfDmkD-Igqay8=&emci=f9e33281-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)** | ****[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59161414/393394939/-482410932?refcode=ea.1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzU3YTFiNy1jOWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfVnIEdROdsd5NlbcS3S6_YYOtBpVvlfDmkD-Igqay8=&emci=f9e33281-b5b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=1757a1b7-c9b3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=1049176)****

Donald J. Trump February 23rd, 2023
** Mar-a-Lago, FL ** – One day after President Donald J. Trump visited East Palestine and delivered supplies to the forgotten community, Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg was forced to finally step foot in the town and face the people he has long ignored.

It has almost been a month since East Palestine suffered its worst tragedy in their history, yet Joe Biden and his administration have neglected to show up with immediate relief. When President Trump announced his trip to meet the people of the community and bring tractor-trailer loads full of essential supplies to help people still affected by the train derailment, the Biden administration curiously sprang into action and approved FEMA resources that were initially rejected.

While President Trump forced the inept federal government and Biden to act, here is how Biden and Buttigieg spent the last 20 days ignoring the concerns of the citizens of East Palestine.

Trump February 23rd, 2023 Mar-a-Lago, FL – One day after President Donald J. Trump visited East Palestine and delivered supplies to the forgotten community, Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg was forced to finally step foot in the town and face the people he has long ignored. It has almost been a month since East Palestine suffered its worst tragedy in their history, yet Joe Biden and his administration have neglected to show up with immediate relief. When President Trump announced his trip to meet the people of the community and bring tractor-trailer loads full of essential supplies to help people still affected by the train derailment, the Biden administration curiously sprang into action and approved FEMA resources that were initially rejected. While President Trump forced the inept federal government and Biden to act, here is how Biden and Buttigieg spent the last 20 days ignoring the concerns of the citizens of East Palestine. Biden and Buttigieg’s Failures Local residents complained about being sick and The Biden administration It took nearly for anyone at the White House to contact the mayor. . Feb 18: No events. Feb 19: Leaves for a Feb 20: Meets Feb 21: Meets Feb 22: Meets Secretary General of NATO and departs . Secretary Buttigieg’s Schedule Feb 4: Celebrates Feb 5: Celebrates Feb 6: No events. Feb 7: No events. Feb 8: No events. Feb 9: Speeches in and Feb 10: No events. Feb 11: No events. Feb 12: No events. Feb 13: and then a speech at the (does not mention the derailment and makes his infamous “ ” comment) Feb 14: Tweets about , wishing someone a , finally a tweet about , then a tweet about , and then another tweet thread doing Feb 15: No events. Feb 19: Submits a to Norfolk Southern Railway’s CEO Feb 20: Says he will go to East Palestine when the Feb 21: Announces a package of and that he wants to Feb 22: Announces he will visit . More Criticism East Palestine Mayor Trent Conaway said on Monday that Biden’s trip to Ukraine was the and showed he “doesn’t care about us” and that he was “furious” Biden was supporting Ukraine and not his town. “It’s ridiculous that Joe Biden hasn’t been to East Palestine. It’s all politics all the time for Biden and he doesn’t give a damn!” “It is unacceptable that it took nearly two weeks for a senior administration official to show up,” Thursday. “I urge President Biden, Administrator Regan, and Transportation Secretary Buttigieg to provide a complete picture of the damage and a comprehensive plan to ensure the community is supported in the weeks, months and years to come, and this sort of accident never happens again.” "We need Congressional inquiry and direct action from Secretary Buttigieg to address this tragedy," Minnesota Democratic wrote on Twitter. "Amidst an impending possible rail strike last year, Secretary Buttigieg left the country to vacation in Portuguese wine country," . "Near misses in commercial aviation, as well as recent system failures, including the one that shutdown air travel in Florida in January, indicate that serious and persistent problems across the DOT are not being sufficiently remedied. I do not have confidence that Secretary Buttigieg is capable of keeping the American people safe." "The people in East Palestine had their water, air, and soil poisoned," wrote on Twitter. "Pete Buttigieg's only response was to spin and say it wasn't a big deal. He's not doing his job. He needs to resign. Now." His comments drew backlash from . Appearing in East Palestine, Senator Vance said, “your Department of Transportation has things it can do. Stop blaming Donald Trump, a guy who hasn’t been president for three years, and use the powers of the federal government to do the things necessary to help people in this community.” "I give Secretary Buttigieg an F," . "I mean, he hasn’t shown up." The Los Angeles Times just released a new poll, Derek — and it
shows Adam Schiff leading the field by 2 points to be California’s next
United States Senator:

Schiff: 22%
Porter: 20%
Lee: 6%
Khanna: 4%
Undecided: 39%
Los Angeles Times, 2/23/23

Adam has the lead and the momentum — California is ready for a Senator who
has stood up for our democracy for years, one committed to building an
economy that works for everyone. And only three weeks after we first
announced he is already ahead.

But it’s still very close and there are many undecided voters we need to
reach to widen our lead, and that’s why your support today is so
important:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=feb2023_abs_em.QMw6L4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230223_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1840%2E5257348%2EejnYDW ]Derek, rush a $10 contribution or any amount you can spare to
help us reach undecided voters across the Golden State and continue to
build this grassroots, people-powered movement without a dime of corporate
PAC money:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

body:
| Hi there,

It’s been a few weeks since I first joined Team Sharice, and all of you have made me feel so welcomed—thank you.

I came to work for Sharice because she is a fighter for Kansans. She’s won her consistently tough races because she remains focused on delivering for families across Kansas and has led the charge to defend reproductive rights, lower the cost of living, fight climate change, protect marriage equality, and so much more.

Sharice won a decisive victory last year thanks to folks like you pitching in early. Now, I have to ask you to help us do it again. After a protracted and embarrassing Speaker election, the House GOP majority passed legislation that offers tax breaks to their rich friends and donors and attacks reproductive freedom nationwide. Instead of addressing inflation, cutting costs, or creating jobs, they’re putting their energy into baseless political “investigations” and threatening to undercut essential programs like Social Security.

**[We can take back control of the House in 2024 if we protect seats like Sharice’s and flip a handful more across the country. We’re laying the groundwork now. Become a digital member and show you’re standing with Sharice.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59161833/393396051/622025358?amount=20&contactdata=apogN9QrWcf60FwkwdhSW9jGNIcnYV9GKTnppjuZk1kQEPAECg3pSt7yX14osHYxUGvXPdu/pNKIxt9MNky0MELRB+AW7Cd1bvBK0coouw7MfWspYiKeAJljqG2oZlOECfeLLGWpHHjUTxH7zrU9kQ==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230223_FR_1.1_0_3MO_CM_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmE5ZGJiMC1jYmIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qQB4HyR7KxTKUw76D9yQXaecP1iJoFmgiT5v4Dbqso4=)**

Peter, Sabato’s Crystal Ball just came out with their first round of ratings of 2024 House races — and they’re calling the majority a _toss-up_. That means it’s anyone’s game, and if we work hard we’ve got a real shot at winning back the majority and taking the gavel from Kevin McCarthy. It’s not just the majority, though. Two of our frontline candidates, Elissa Slotkin and Susan Wild, are in the toss-up ranking themselves — and seven others aren’t considered “safe”, either. Not only do we have to pick up a few more seats, but we also have to protect our vulnerable incumbents. It sounds daunting, but with your support, we’ll get it done. Door opens at 6:30 we get started shortly after.
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
## Moises Merino is President & CEO of GROW Elect
---
|
---
Moises Merino is President & CEO of GROW Elect and MBA Public Affairs, an award-winning
public affairs and political consulting firm. He has over 20 years of political and public policy
experience at the local, state and national levels. In 2015, he was named one of the “40 Under
40” best and brightest in the industry by the American Association of Political Consultants
(AAPC). Moises has also been recognized for his accomplishments and featured by Latino
Leaders Magazine. He’s been a guest commentator on major television networks such as CNN,
Univision and Telemundo.
Moises is one of the premier experts on the subject of the Latino vote. His methodological
approach to messaging is a key component to gaining support for public policy initiatives.
Moises’s strategic planning incorporates cultural and cross-cultural ideologies and values that
help shape public opinion.
Moises is a co-founder of the non-profit Latino Leadership & Policy Forum and GROW Elect, a
Political Action Committee that has recruited, trained, and elected over 300 Latino Republicans
to public office. He has also served as political director and advisor on a number of committees
and high-profile campaigns, including the California Republican Party, Meg Whitman for
Governor, John McCain for President, Arnold Schwarzenegger for Governor, and George W.
Bush for President.
Moises is from East Los Angeles (Boyle Heights) and received his Bachelor of Arts degree in
History from UCLA. In addition, he went on to earn his Masters in Public Administration.
## Mike Cargile running for Chairman of the California Republican Party.
---
---
|
---
My friends and fellow delegates,
I am Mike Cargile and am running for Chairman of the California Republican Party.
I am a conservative Christian and have been for the last 25 years. As a Christian, I never lie. My “yes” is my “yes” and my “no” is my “no”. Additionally, I am the grateful recipient of the Appalachian wisdom of my grandmother who drilled into me the concept that “profanity is the feeble attempt of a weak mind to express itself”. Couple that with “Out of the heart the mouth speaks” and you get the point.
---
|
---

| | Peter, we’ll keep this quick.

[**_We’re humbly asking for your help as we build up the Democratic infrastructure in Georgia ahead of 2024. Will you donate now to help us build out our party and keep Georgia blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59162875/393399072/710125701?refcode=20230223.2_PSD_2AQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYwZjMzMy1jZWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MirMpDBFhNl12ihKuq-QAWMHmE_u45zjCEDocLEyu8g=)_

We have a lot of work to do to flip the House and hold the White House in 2024. While we scored a crucial victory by re-electing Rev. Warnock in December, November wasn’t without setbacks — we fell short in other races across the state.

We can’t afford to fall short next year – that’s why we need your help right now.

[**_Please, we need your help to build the Democratic infrastructure that can win up and down the ballot, at all levels, and across the state.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/59162886/393399083/710125701?refcode=20230223.2_PSD_2AQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTYwZjMzMy1jZWIzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MirMpDBFhNl12ihKuq-QAWMHmE_u45zjCEDocLEyu8g=)_

Thank you. Together, we can continue Georgia’s progress and come back from last year’s setbacks with force.

– GA Dems

Fellow American,

Democrats never fail to amaze me. While Republicans are trying to clean up the mess from the last two years of failed leadership, _Democrats have their eye on taking back the House in 2024...**and I’m their number one target!**_

Democrats recently released a list of top targets for the 2024 election, and they are investing **millions** in South Carolina, specifically this seat! Democratic strategists know SC-01 is the most purple district in the nation, which is why they’re investing in flipping it blue.

I’m in DC, putting my head down to do the work of the American people, which is why I hate to ask you this favor, but it is part of the job. [**Would you spare any amount today to invest in keeping this seat red and ensuring our team has the resources to fight back?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=75b1fe22c94a474998423f67fa0fa62c&_e=BO3yalmS2aLu0Gwx5cbnKo3hAVWej7_5Nn6tOm8SIw7Fbcw80pF6x5ZAWMPXxardaq365hVNkjPWQxnF6jDfBKtkIqI_OHUzzZX6WxSBmfN5nxQxavb4ed3tAPvDrgWdkFsMmztOqzIywnpQ84WFUd60LwgS82PZLZP9jFAGuBUMjMxIURfulewWlDWV4ZJcG6mVJ7CSKuVvhfLM5ARa0O5jLI7o0hCqgvC7YBr5ZZmG85ayFMXYBIebaqnm59TxJit4x3Txzg59YVl43lHeXuGd0fl1S0ZZc6AGKFjpQZVF-wMXKtfQiuLi1Qb4Gxfsi9DuFMBsIZRkFd2iP1LNofZF__olUvn3nyaFbAB02FOVS4-m85icWgbePCLIObzaOne-R8oHEc2jzVz4OOvzAw%3D%3D)
